name: Roy Cooper
subject: In case you missed my announcement:
body:
We’re taking back the Senate Majority.
---
Derek, I’m Roy Cooper. On Monday, we launched our campaign to help take back the United States Senate for Democrats, and already, the enthusiasm we’ve seen from folks across the country is astonishing. Can I have a moment of your time to reintroduce myself and let you know why I’m running? [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn) [**_If you don’t need to hear anything else, you can go ahead and split a contribution between our campaign and the DNC right now._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn) **[SPLIT A DONATION](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn)** **North Carolina is my home, and I’ve spent a lifetime in service to this state.** It’s where I was born, raised, went to school, and raised my own family. I’ve had the honor of serving as a state legislator, Attorney General, and Governor. **I’m proud of the work we achieved together — including bringing thousands of jobs to the state and, in what may have been my most impactful achievement as Governor, expanding Medicaid.** Now, more than 650,000 North Carolinians are covered by Medicaid expansion — but that coverage is imperiled by Washington Republicans’ bill slashing funding for Medicaid and other services Americans rely on. **I’m asking for your support to serve our nation as the next Democratic Senator because so much of the progress we have made is in danger now, not only for North Carolinians, but for every American._That’s why I’m running for Senate._** I’m running because **every American deserves access to health care** — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout. I’m running because **reproductive rights are fundamental** — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide. I’m running because **our planet is in jeopardy** — and right now the people in power would rather allow corporations to pollute our air and water than find a new direction. **Americans deserve leaders who will take a stand for what is right. I am ready to serve again, but this time in Washington.** [**I can make no greater pledge to you than this: I will always do what I think is right for the people of our great state and country. Derek, we can win this race, but it won’t be easy. I need you with me as a Founding Donor today. Does $10 fit in your budget? Split a contribution between our campaign and the DNC today >>>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Roy Cooper and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn)**

| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-cooper-split?refcode=em_20250802_4161_fr&refcode2=4161_22930333_keXcHn&akid=4161%2E22930333%2EkeXcHn)**
---
****
Together,
Roy Cooper

name: Team VAP
subject: Stunning assault
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080225_1&amount=25]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
PITCH IN $25 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE ACT NOW ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080225_1&amount=25]
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080225_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080225_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080225_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080225_1&amount=50]

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080225_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080225_1&amount=20]

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Sell us out? We send you packing!!!
body:
Tom Cotton (Arkansas) and Joni Ernst (Iowa) sold us out — they promised to protect Medicaid, then voted to gut it and shower billionaires with tax breaks.
Now they want another six years in power? Not a chance.
We’re building the war chest to defeat them and elect Democrats who will actually fight for working families. Chip in now to help flip these seats and hold the line in 2026! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cottonernst?refcode=080225_4]
Tom Cotton and Joni Ernst.
They promised they’d never gut Medicaid. They said they’d protect working families and the most vulnerable.
They lied.
When Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” came up, they voted to slash Medicaid and hand billionaires a windfall.
Now they want six more years in the Senate?!?
Not on our watch.
They're both up for re-election next year, and we're building a war chest starting NOW to suppor the Democrats who run against these MAGA sellouts. If you're ready to fight back and protect working families, chip in to help flip these seats in 2026! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cottonernst?refcode=080225_4]

subject: Couldn’t have done it without you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS

body:
If we’re going to get this done, we need to start organizing + mobilizing Democrats across the country TODAY.
#
This is how we’ll flip the U.S. Senate in 2026, Peter.
**We need to defend these FOUR seats:**
**Georgia**
Jon Ossoff (D) **Michigan**
Open Seat **Minnesota**
Open Seat **New Hampshire**
Open Seat

**We need to flip these TWO seats:**
**Maine**
Susan Collins (R) **North Carolina**
Open Seat

**[FLIP THESE SEATS: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93181?refcode=em20250802-9215&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9215%2E614464%2ESU3Uzd)**

**Florida**
Ashley Moody (R) **Iowa**

John Cornyn (R)

name: Tim Macy
subject: Bombshell report just released from POLITICO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GOA Victory Fund
body:
Cornyn has spent years cozying up to the gun control crowd, cutting deals that sell out our rights.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ziafosge9blfni73cvllj8f6ba5op403usl9soe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i6aoj6cdh2bs)
---
Friend – There’s no way to sugarcoat this—Politico just dropped a bombshell: John Cornyn hauled in over **$1 MILLION** more than Ken Paxton last quarter. **[That’s D.C. elite money flooding into Texas, trying to crush one of the boldest Second Amendment warriors we’ve got.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr57uql1d1h4vkcbf62gosvjuvffu845dcmvkv4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i6aoj6cdh2bs)**
---
[ **DEFEND KEN PAXTON** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zahgldhd0uintl2av5lhi6mnn6s3ve4scp6tooog_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i6aoj6cdh2bs)
---
Let’s be honest: Cornyn has spent years cozying up to the gun control crowd, cutting deals that sell out our rights. Now he’s using his massive war chest—and the establishment’s checkbooks—to drown out Ken Paxton, the one guy who’s fought relentlessly for gun owners across the country. If we stand by and watch this play out, the D.C. swamp is going to steamroll Paxton and hand a U.S. Senate seat over to another anti-2A sellout. That’s why I’m emailing you today: **gun owners like us have to step up—right now—if we’re going to turn the tide.** **[I’m asking you to rush your most urgent donation—$25, $50, $100, or whatever you can—to the GOA Victory Fund.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi91p16ql5sb9l4gre69qemt1k8dnnfi2e9e4slo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i6aoj6cdh2bs)** Every single dollar you give fires up the grassroots, exposes Cornyn’s anti-gun record, and gives Paxton the backing he needs to WIN.

name: Mike Collins
subject: Career politicians HATE that “trucker trash” crashed their cocktail party.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE
body:
Will you ride shotgun with me?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z577munjj7lcc5frspgia7a564s6ml1bu02gm3l0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs)
**Patriot,**
As someone who drove 18-wheelers for a living, I know a thing or two about preparing for the long haul. And let me tell you, it ain't always easy.

**Now that I 'm running for United States Senate, I'm asking you to RIDE SHOTGUN with me and help put some diesel in the tank. **
** **
**Will you rush over $25 or more to help me WIN BIG for Republicans in Georgia?**
.
** **[PUT DIESEL IN THE TANK>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjs3nanl3fb7crcag7bv3uud3kg0hvea178nuu4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs).********
.
This is Rep. Mike Collins.
** **
I'll tell you one more thing about the trucking business.
** **
If you don't show up...
** **
If you don't deliver...
** **
**_You get FIRED - something my colleagues in Washington know nothing about._**
** **
You get it.
.
Washington is a broken place.
.
You get rewarded for failure.
.
You get re-elected for carrying out zero of your promises.
.
You get a **PROMOTION** for making life **WORSE** for the American people - and that's all thanks to the big money machine keeping the "status-quo" in place.
** **
Look, I'm not a product of the D.C. machine.
** **
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth.
** **
**I paid my dues and learned life lessons hauling cargo from the Atlantic, to the Pacific, down to the _Gulf of America._**
**_._**
** **[DELIVER A MAJOR WIN>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr0foll47nfhroi3jab8ett3k6c4qh5dv2trvre0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs).********
.
**Our government should be run by people with REAL EXPERIENCE doing REAL WORK.**
** **
Hey, I'd happily vote for you over any of these career politician numbskulls.
** **
If you've spent your life writing academic papers and sipping free cocktails at D.C. penthouses, you simply don't have what it takes to fight for working-class people.
** **
So I'm going to shoot you straight here.
** **
**I 'm asking you to chip in $10 so I can prepare for the long haul.**
****
.

** **[CHIP IN NOW>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z46q9tmqbcbj5980s5s9kftciclu9df47ith5gig_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs).****
.
**Here in battleground Georgia, there is no "off-year". **
** **
It's election season 24/7, 365.
** **
The Democrats are raising MILLIONS to take me down, and like most Americans, I don't have millions in the bank.
** **
But I know, so long as patriots like you chip in what you can - _whether it 's $1 or $1,000_ - I can take the bullets and arrows and get the job done for the American people.
** **
**Will you rush over your best donation today?**
**. **
** ** **[PUT DIESEL IN THE TANK>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7kiq0qt1nj9qus72r0afjjice1del18b94epqso_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs).******
******..******.
_Godspeed,_****
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0dvi8npkcusfpjsjmrv6pgaf7dhjeu759n71r20_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs)
_Rep. Mike Collins_
_Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-GA)_
.
**[CHIP IN $10>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhskgvomurufmk3eka3j7hapj2k9kd4mcfaca66o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs)**.
**[CHIP IN $25>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zttg8372mquhhqiq5hqgkii26olufghru8k809uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs)**
**[CHIP IN $50>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh98ajpu18df6d80jpsjmp7pgejj9qmohd9vepo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs)**
**[CHIP IN $100 OR MORE>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg68fuu7b27jign5hc49k3l37l91pec61grhfi1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o70cjh2bs)**
**.**
**___________________________**
****_**MEET MIKE COLLINS**_
Mike Collins is an America First conservative running for U.S. Senate. He currently represents Georgia's 10th Congressional District in the House of Representatives, but he's no career politician. He spent decades building a _trucking empire_ from the ground up -- hauling freight across the country, creating good-paying jobs, and putting food on the table for over 100 Georgia families.****
**Today, he 's bringing that same roll-up-the-sleeves mentality to Washington:**
_> Cutting government waste_
_> Torching reckless spending_
_> Shredding job-killing regulations_
_> Firing tyrannical, do-nothing bureaucrats_
_> Revving up the illegal alien deportation machine; and_
_> Defending America from those who seek to destroy her_****
Mike lives in Jackson, Georgia with his wife, Leigh Ann. They've got three grown kids, six grandkids, and a**fire in their belly to help President Trump get our country back on track.**
**

**

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1qmpkfn4qmgh1giflt3noqnevqqi4rsdlg21rk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o74c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc03f8mdi4ot7v06uh3uisaqgh8b7imlgkussi8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o74c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt732nlc2gv7phu5rnp551oi2lao9r1a4gbistbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o74c9h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z344jla416o8jo7e26od9eq4gh7dah8l84lsc5po_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9i61o74c9h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Mike Collins
subject: Career politicians HATE that “trucker trash” crashed their cocktail party.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE
body:
Will you ride shotgun with me?

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlskofhabddbj92nqptlcem10td8dr5ljji6g0pg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs)
**Patriot,**
As someone who drove 18-wheelers for a living, I know a thing or two about preparing for the long haul. And let me tell you, it ain't always easy.

**Now that I 'm running for United States Senate, I'm asking you to RIDE SHOTGUN with me and help put some diesel in the tank. **
** **
**Will you rush over $25 or more to help me WIN BIG for Republicans in Georgia?**
.
** **[PUT DIESEL IN THE TANK>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfvq8ik98em61fiq8gqddqadsjl9e4bu6806udp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs).********
.
This is Rep. Mike Collins.
** **
I'll tell you one more thing about the trucking business.
** **
If you don't show up...
** **
If you don't deliver...
** **
**_You get FIRED - something my colleagues in Washington know nothing about._**
** **
You get it.
.
Washington is a broken place.
.
You get rewarded for failure.
.
You get re-elected for carrying out zero of your promises.
.
You get a **PROMOTION** for making life **WORSE** for the American people - and that's all thanks to the big money machine keeping the "status-quo" in place.
** **
Look, I'm not a product of the D.C. machine.
** **
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth.
** **
**I paid my dues and learned life lessons hauling cargo from the Atlantic, to the Pacific, down to the _Gulf of America._**
**_._**
** **[DELIVER A MAJOR WIN>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze1avs3dkqbrmgl8s006mmckjfjdduac4a2kgfq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs).********
.
**Our government should be run by people with REAL EXPERIENCE doing REAL WORK.**
** **
Hey, I'd happily vote for you over any of these career politician numbskulls.
** **
If you've spent your life writing academic papers and sipping free cocktails at D.C. penthouses, you simply don't have what it takes to fight for working-class people.
** **
So I'm going to shoot you straight here.
** **
**I 'm asking you to chip in $10 so I can prepare for the long haul.**
****
.

** **[CHIP IN NOW>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5jpg0amhbdugl4n3upj8ct8abgc4dqhglp67k2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs).****
.
**Here in battleground Georgia, there is no "off-year". **
** **
It's election season 24/7, 365.
** **
The Democrats are raising MILLIONS to take me down, and like most Americans, I don't have millions in the bank.
** **
But I know, so long as patriots like you chip in what you can - _whether it 's $1 or $1,000_ - I can take the bullets and arrows and get the job done for the American people.
** **
**Will you rush over your best donation today?**
**. **
** ** **[PUT DIESEL IN THE TANK>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8tb5p2bshq8ll8j7bsfh5hrjjkhdeu0ii8u3lbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs).******
******..******.
_Godspeed,_****
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6krpv47sqfc97mrl53v9t981mic7ra7kjjdckc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs)
_Rep. Mike Collins_
_Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-GA)_
.
**[CHIP IN $10>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjk9dtpv8pqh8e94u81d9000dhn2fho5r5bqr5ag_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs)**.
**[CHIP IN $25>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk9bjqcdc646uk1r2a17br946m1dbg7h1ti4046g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs)**
**[CHIP IN $50>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztkge0s2h6e5vkp4ocvfij57ltmbvrqc7o1kohf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs)**
**[CHIP IN $100 OR MORE>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbmn6iv7ipe1ivphf2rurdoaol36q47ocglml71g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob2cjh2bs)**
**.**
**___________________________**
****_**MEET MIKE COLLINS**_
Mike Collins is an America First conservative running for U.S. Senate. He currently represents Georgia's 10th Congressional District in the House of Representatives, but he's no career politician. He spent decades building a _trucking empire_ from the ground up -- hauling freight across the country, creating good-paying jobs, and putting food on the table for over 100 Georgia families.****
**Today, he 's bringing that same roll-up-the-sleeves mentality to Washington:**
_> Cutting government waste_
_> Torching reckless spending_
_> Shredding job-killing regulations_
_> Firing tyrannical, do-nothing bureaucrats_
_> Revving up the illegal alien deportation machine; and_
_> Defending America from those who seek to destroy her_****
Mike lives in Jackson, Georgia with his wife, Leigh Ann. They've got three grown kids, six grandkids, and a**fire in their belly to help President Trump get our country back on track.**
**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z25901opjvclgbou5j50hsr0d89m1rieqdc2l27o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob6chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmf32g66onvc84tho447jnol3omvprmln9cm57dg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob6chh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl8odk1otu408iaspj118a8j7e6ct18k6m4462to_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob6chh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zii5kr61e7g2qcgeigga1s8jkj7jgi3ana2dbfjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob6chh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zij8uhobf4kktr4nb7mb1l6dhvgpqku5hdtffhsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob6chh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmosqbidekaa5vtd587pnlmdk9mgp2cjhrm5p6p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob6chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi4t3s22o0ieitstf9te6i0i65igq6tp0t8tp0fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob6chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn9707f3ihvucerl6isglrfr38bjlt4plitm413g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob6chh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6sgjq0ma0bckv9mhpadfi8ejfaqa5b0rsi5pid8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h64ob6chh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

---

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt0gru9l34u5cao9r2eurgj2olscau35vkop2j60_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h6cpj6cph2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb4jmh3mhniroek9r21o25t7bul1cid30if3ap28_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h6cpj6cph2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjtbsubpob4tb4l587ua5fmbtrj7qf3uvka6i51g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h6cpj6cph2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr6615i3rtbl6kcdqr5l3f52iftuksu33a94toso_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h6cpj6cph2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoigs05dc91cd1lj9phomd4dtiqqf42oc97ikd9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h6cpj6cph2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmvqbgd8eo7h6nr0rova1h37mvnubmhosl36l770_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h6cpj6cph2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8ln8if9oh8lmrke6mmguuvaq1si2mo9rerg4ad8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h6cpj6cph2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu7udn446cukrv62po1u88j3o229qo30td2e7cn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c9h6cpj6cph2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote

## Corporation for Public Broadcasting to Shut Down
The Corporation for Public Broadcasting on Friday announced it will [shut down operations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAYhJ8Gd1jwA3ZcUFzjLtdeaWH4STgRQEBi5e1X3jTbbzfSaEbzzb_rdjUhhnT7ax6ou89bwqNF7B3rVp57DHav2ThrWg_p1rONueEGDBRlF8rE5kyI700OTntEQDGg5rOSwJWSy3DXfgI3T2jEZQFjlbSz2-cdOJiJK774IeizjV2Y4IwpOY1Czn5hizCKO8fBEcnQhZ7r-D-H1O_o4zu_sI42P4ao772XRsQfAiuB9TiO0e7tpDh9AuspCaw215Kr6SEn6nOlHzj6k46mUmnZG_XosJpI7bM3mgt-Yo1icgTWoWpXjhBjaNNMJLs9TIjfY_qvHnxp-AoAAP__NRGH2w) in September after losing $1.1 billion in federal funding. CPB, with close to 100 employees, provides funds to 1,500 local public radio and television stations as well as PBS and NPR. President Trump and Republican allies have long argued that taxpayer funding for public media represents [unnecessary government spending](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGTpCAQBeBfg5lW04COAcElZHPphRZCo1wxYiGONf_-yttk8827-r3v_XlOTxtT3Jbf9kW6hjxtdB2JaqUy7eecoptLtt7Zo8ZtqdmlfNCEgKqFRwti8jamzyQbrwMRkmhI80FJ5ErJsVm1UHL2_egCgEAxh0H1gR5zrxx4y1XfRH1_gwcIDqBk3wk5hBFGYRX3nqNnEsjHmkv3N8etrhTSJ7-pdC6_mqTXWveDiV8MDUNzXVdXV1pOW3y0233D0JxHe7sYmjuLobHnwtAAZ2hcLnsutsa8tSGX9kvdfme3t_os1BTt9yumFI9-YBKWl43pf436o-3eGv8FAAD__7i-g58), while claiming that PBS and NPR programming exhibits anti-conservative bias. CPB informed employees on Friday that [most staff positions will end](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGuozAQheGnMZ3RMNgYChfb0GXbLdFgjxOvHIyME5S3XyUrXd3-vsDR_50_l-VCMcXt-pvubGvIy8bnkbhWLsv-WFN0a8nkHR01bteaXcoHLwioJYwS-sVTTK9FNd4GZuS-YdsZrbDTWk3NzfJI6zqwU5MDhT2BNsYEmsJqFHUTN9G-12CEvgPQamh7ZcIEU0-6875DLxSwjzWX9m-OW71xSK_85NK6fG-SvdW6H6L_JXAWOJ_n2dLq2o1rSw-B89sjcP4qRoHz45Aulz0XqjFvMuQi_1vld6ysWX64AucO9ABK4dgU6_czphSPwQgF1zvF9CmpP7rvafFfAAAA__-OdYKM) on September 30.
## Deadly Bacteria on the Rise
Health officials are warning of a rise in potentially [deadly "flesh-eating" bacteria](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u7CAUBOCnwR0WPuAfCoorXVlpNm1K6xgONhFrVsDuym8fOa-QeqTRfPN1W24YYji2T7yTqT4tB71LpFopL4_nGoNdc0JnsdRwbDXZmAotIKDnYuJCLg5DPBfVOOOJgGRDpht7BV3fK93sxuppklqC1tZb1wGNgkiOGuy00kB9E8zVJiYhOyF6NbRSjV4LLbHvnOvAMSXIhZpy-53CUXfy8Uwvyq1N9yaavdZHYfIfg5nBjKu9BO2WrpjB_EEY685gdoQuntxHKjsnvDh8RVspB-QWCxWeQyG-PaPnNmGpDOZSUz6ZnINj8n8HCvQg9dRk4x7vEGMow8iU2O4Y4u-c-qcPXwZ-AgAA___W3YVy) cases this summer along the Gulf Coast, particularly in Florida and Louisiana. The [Vibrio vulnificus](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAQxvHT4M4WHiA4BcVr3OW1W1pgBntWExMBcZTbr7JX2Av8Pn3_r9ty88R0bP_9HV1LeTnwVRlbw7I8noFpDSX7uPra6NhaXjlXXECC6eXUS7VET_xedBddQgRUHbrRGg2jMfra7S6BldqqCyYPkw82oQ0IJkQzheS17sh9NDlJNUpp9GVQ2qarvCpvxhhHiEJLjNRyGb4zHW3HxO98YhnWfO_Y7a09qlD_BMwCZo77wH7Y8ilg_nwRMJ8UCuX-fPJBidZn7T-LXXHx8SJmqhcrtNzunvjXbH8KcTr4CQAA___mgnHi) bacteria typically occur in warm ocean water and can affect people through open wounds. Symptoms include stomach illness, severe wound infections, and in some cases, life-threatening blood poisoning. This year, health officials in Florida have confirmed 13 cases and four deaths, while Louisiana has reported 17 cases and four deaths. Both Mississippi and Alabama have reported single cases, neither fatal. Vibrio is the source of about [80,000 illnesses](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DmO4zAQheHTSBkNrloCBpM486QTCiWyKHG6LApk2YZv33BfoeMHPHz4_92WG2TKx_YX7ug5leXAVyNkxrqcj5VyWGuBGKBxPjYugUrDRUvthJyENEuETO_F9tEnRI2mR69GZ7Vyzs797uXkpjVJYzBNKw6jdYOSRmEY9BhRyT77z5ucpFFSOjtcjB3TLGcDTsWodOysxJi51Mv_kg_eMdG7PLFeQrn35Hfms3XmT6evnb6eWE7Cz9TpayJsu0D40MUKgbFmEITwxCYmERGiMFq0HL4EhFpaE9uDkggFGovGwNiEUuNk3Dj31cfzlYlyG8bOyu0OmX4M_KtwT6-_AwAA___Xh4Gl) in the United States per year.
## Hot Dog Spill Snarls Highway Traffic
A truckload of [hot dogs spilled across](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL8GOiNjbI4rXKShu7Qp0WIvsNFiI-wD8fcRUf4g3ZNGGs28r9fwAmIK8yesaPMUh4BnYswZ92F7j0xu3CN4BylTmHN0HBMOSiojZCdkM3ggvgZdejshKmxKtPXDaFUbo5_lYv2Ebe3r1jmYjJKybTs5KkANujGdNyXZu012sqmlNLqtGv2YnvLZgKm9r5UvtERPOe7Vd6SQF5z4igfulYtryXbJeUtF81GovlD9eZ5VGN394s4L1d9YqP6dxB8tMQsfZ5E2YhaMcGASiWnbcL_EiimJDUNIFx8QCMRC83LCJXYXQCllurbcrd9OYqbUPgot5xWIf-fkfzk8rPoJAAD___STh9M) a Pennsylvania interstate Friday morning, briefly clogging traffic in both directions on the busy highway. A tractor-trailer hit a passenger vehicle and scraped a concrete divider, spilling over 1,000 pounds of frozen frankfurters across the highway. Four people were injured and transported to a local hospital. Crews assessed barrier damage and used heavy machinery to clean up, scooping boxes of scattered sausages from the roadway. [You can see the clean-up efforts here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2unTAUhFdjOiNz_AMuXKShe2lTImMf4CS-GNnORew-um8LqaYYaUbf9-tr-fKU6Nx_-he6tuXlxLsmbA3Lcv1dE4W1ZB-Dr43OveWQcsUFBGguJi7kEj2lZ1FddBsioOzQDaNWMGitbHc4DcaucgQjzTZYuyLgNgUzjag3DaPpyH3WxCTkIIRWppdq3Kyw0ushxgEiUwIjtVz635nOduCWnvzG0of86pI7Wrsqkz8YzAzm-777e_fpUzKYfWkUEjKYLzzP-qS3P8nzJ5c_nPgkeSi-HvybKvJWfGi5fJISFn7kxmPeK4PZaD0qa4euuHjdlBJVMzIl9pen77Ou_Ze-t4N_AQAA__8XHoQU).

clean_body: The Corporation for Public Broadcasting announced on Friday it will after losing federal funding. | | | | | | Sunday, August 3, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1958, completed the first undersea voyage to the North Pole, establishing a shorter route between the Pacific and Atlantic Oceans. Each edition of The Flyover is a big deal to us, but tomorrow’s is a really big deal. We’re announcing something special, and you don’t want to miss it. It’s the beginning of something huge that involves our readers, and we can’t wait to tell you about it. See you in the morning! Get advanced sun care products from today's sponsor, . | Corporation for Public Broadcasting to Shut Down The Corporation for Public Broadcasting on Friday announced it will in September after losing $1.1 billion in federal funding. CPB, with close to 100 employees, provides funds to 1,500 local public radio and television stations as well as PBS and NPR. President Trump and Republican allies have long argued that taxpayer funding for public media represents , while claiming that PBS and NPR programming exhibits anti-conservative bias. CPB informed employees on Friday that on September 30. Deadly Bacteria on the Rise Health officials are warning of a rise in potentially cases this summer along the Gulf Coast, particularly in Florida and Louisiana. The bacteria typically occur in warm ocean water and can affect people through open wounds. Symptoms include stomach illness, severe wound infections, and in some cases, life-threatening blood poisoning. This year, health officials in Florida have confirmed 13 cases and four deaths, while Louisiana has reported 17 cases and four deaths. Both Mississippi and Alabama have reported single cases, neither fatal. Vibrio is the source of about in the United States per year. Hot Dog Spill Snarls Highway Traffic A truckload of a Pennsylvania interstate Friday morning, briefly clogging traffic in both directions on the busy highway. A tractor-trailer hit a passenger vehicle and scraped a concrete divider, spilling over 1,000 pounds of frozen frankfurters across the highway. Four people were injured and transported to a local hospital. Crews assessed barrier damage and used heavy machinery to clean up, scooping boxes of scattered sausages from the roadway. . subject: America 250 is just getting started
body:
Have you started celebrating?

| | | | |

I’m celebrating America’s 250th the right way:

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: 6-3! Defunding Planned Parenthood is now a reality
body:
Great news as champions for life today!

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s0XNskVP3O4fUSjbnN3x7A~~/AARclBA~/TUChcXBYACvploudVod8T_GgACvstwmjW584-GIWIGbSlqD039qm_8lYZUKNj2qy4CiKrasE0n-1z6sF00Eq_BzRHZBqp_Q8c2P1E4opPUJiaz7dcdtebbbQMrLM4owhD_z27B47P2h8SbKOY3Z0rtwNg8aNTe8gwhuBLef8e54DWFG5S3mcUzFf8_I8_Kp6nTp7570HD9f5RsH1xfrgF-i6oIXRRqBzGSc-3lgvQWpGYlrUTr8SazSZLi7OmZiUoXGOQrc19HDLBgupI8Ew6i7iim0CnkKvGlyLs0bMxZg~)

##
Dear Champion of Life,

Great news as champions for life today! The U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling leaves states FREE to defund Planned Parenthood!

The decision in _Medina v. Planned Parenthood_ reinstates a South Carolina order that deemed abortion giants like Planned Parenthood unqualified for taxpayer funds via Medicaid.

This is a huge decision that could protect countless unborn lives, as well as women and young people across the country--especially if other states follow South Carolina's courageous lead.

Planned Parenthood has taken the lives of millions of unborn children over the years. It has also left so many women and children scarred--physically and emotionally--as a result of its pro-abortion, pro-gender ideology agenda.

No American should be forced to fund businesses that profit from harming and taking innocent lives. Thankfully, the Supreme Court's ruling today means that funding can finally end.

And now we have an opportunity to call on other states to take a stand against Big Abortion.

Now, there is no excuse. Thanks to ADF's win for South Carolina, the Supreme Court has allowed **states to defund Planned Parenthood.**

[Will you help us take the next step for a pro-life America?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s0XNskVP3O4fUSjbnN3x7A~~/AARclBA~/TUChcXBYACvploudVod8T_GgACvstwmjW584-GIWIGbSlqD039qm_8lYZUKNj2qy4CiKrasE0n-1z6sF00Eq_BzRHZBqp_Q8c2P1E4opPUJiaz7dcdtebbbQMrLM4owhD_z27B47P2h8SbKOY3Z0rtwNg8aNTe8gwhuBLef8e54DWFG5S3mcUzFf8_I8_Kp6nTp7570HD9f5RsH1xfrgF-i6oIXRRqBzGSc-3lgvQWpGYlrUTr8SazSZLi7OmZiUoXGOQrc19HDLBgupI8Ew6i7iim0CnkKvGlyLs0bMxZg~) Here at Alliance Defending Freedom, we're ready to work alongside the next states who are brave enough to say NO to Planned Parenthood. **But to do that we need your help, today.** [**Your gift of any amount will help save lives**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s0XNskVP3O4fUSjbnN3x7A~~/AARclBA~/TUChcXBYACvploudVod8T_GgACvstwmjW584-GIWIGbSlqD039qm_8lYZUKNj2qy4CiKrasE0n-1z6sF00Eq_BzRHZBqp_Q8c2P1E4opPUJiaz7dcdtebbbQMrLM4owhD_z27B47P2h8SbKOY3Z0rtwNg8aNTe8gwhuBLef8e54DWFG5S3mcUzFf8_I8_Kp6nTp7570HD9f5RsH1xfrgF-i6oIXRRqBzGSc-3lgvQWpGYlrUTr8SazSZLi7OmZiUoXGOQrc19HDLBgupI8Ew6i7iim0CnkKvGlyLs0bMxZg~) as we stand together to defund Planned Parenthood state by state.

In Christ,

**Julia Payne Koon**
Legal Counsel

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1940, Pro Football Hall of Fame wide receiver [Lance Alworth](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQQOGnwV0sPIB_Coo0rm5uuyXCMI5HS0wEozh--1X2FbY8zVecr5u7eUq03__7B1p-r9nteNSEzFjc4pdzQc81x1gLRqpcKDDtDiSYixwvUrnoKZ1ON9EuMk5dg7YbjIZunKRqNquV72OvRjBTDFquYwi9HoKRaAyERTdkP5gcpeo62SnVGliHYYwapgA6oBFaYiTOpeUNGd--runMLyxtyI8m2Y35WYW6CpgFzLi3B33TEyP5Npe7gPnTAuZ_fg_orunIhbem2Pg8KCWq_SC0vD88pV-Q_7bhZeEnAAD__xCVcZc) was born in Houston. ## Lottery Dispute Ends in Settlement
The Texas Lottery [Commission agreed to pay](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O2zAQhJ-G6tYgqR_LhQo3AnKB06YUVuLqyIQiDe76eH77wH6FdAMMMJjv-31bbhhiSJ-_8KBJvve8JKocSYTKsuL6XAmFs3NcyAWWEjYJabHa9qBH0O3iMMTn0jVuWrW7mIYmc-47a8aLbhs_6X29IO567OzQuX5rBySzj86afhiM25swvcb0qFtjtGnbU2_383l0nb1sttuoV50mFySXk3gS-kbe4zN_UTlt-Wji5EXurNqrsrOyc631dHB6dcrOlODBys4vKGXnd_b5wZIT1HxgguozE4ztATG_oJ_wB7e_9yxQkcFRCuSghsQQsfIjCLAnuEdMDJLB55QLeCoQUQj8g1dMTtkZC1yv5uPnj49bUyZ3ryHGwMNZdfrzwBDf5-X_lH9N9l8AAAD__5oxmHM) a woman $45.89 million to settle a lawsuit over its denial of her $83.5 million jackpot payout. Kristen Moriarty, who picked all six numbers for an $83.5 million jackpot, was denied her winnings after Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick visited the store where she bought the ticket. Lottery officials subsequently refused to provide Moriarty her winnings, citing the pending investigation, which prompted Moriarty to sue the Commission's Executive Director. Moriarty was awarded $45.89 million on Wednesday, two days before the scheduled hearing in court. You can find the full settlement [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuuozAQhp_GdKBhbG6Fi23osu2WyNhDMpLBkT0bwtsfJa9w-v-i7_t3W26OIx_3v24nK-8tLQedJZII5WV167WSk5JCKJkCF8nshY8FAbsaxhr0EhzHazFVsCuEqa3ItkNnsB0n0NXDmmnY9DR4Rx5wDaD7zRnj-7X3ELzGiu1nDEbQbQut1k2H2zCMweDk0XjqlAEKLCk38iChtytbvNKLcuPTXkX7EHkWpf8onBXO53k23hU-UqZnylI-KYXzt1jH9AG76ujO8p-lLiQSaadDFM5VtuF5coxc-kEZuO-O4_dEfqfmZfEnAAD__3EXeq8).
## Firefighting Goes Autonomous
Texas could be the first state to see fully [autonomous Black Hawk helicopters](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD3O4yAUPA3ubGHAAQqKbdxl2y0tDM_hScRY8DZObr9y9ghfN9L8aebPfbl7zLg_fvsnOHpvZdnhbBmIoC6rXz8reGolxlYhYqOKgXBfBBdTz03P5RI95s-iuuhWHu3YgRv1pMRoLJddct5ytd4M94FbqbSZovVbXDcT5bZZEzp0Vxg3XI4jH6UcJrFpbaISNggVYGKKQ0QqdaAEBG_ftvwpL6hDKM8uu0R0NCZ_MTEzMZ_nOYRUy36xTMzXHCbmVP42Knv_9TMx-0oYMlwI-wQZQzkIavsv6AXXVmthhyMdXXXxODFnbDfNFH88PeZvN_3ssZcT_wIAAP__xpCAwg), thanks to research by Texas A&M University and the U.S. Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency. With $60 million in funding, the partnership's goal is to convert traditional UH-60 Blackhawks into AI-powered aircrafts that can fight fires without a pilot. The choppers will be able to carry out water drops, supply deliveries, and aerial surveillance in places too risky for human crews. The helicopters will be developed and tested over the next two years and will involve several emergency response teams from across the state. Read the full story [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAUhJ8GMyz-HDUg2MTsbrqhhXAcTxWIBceZ8e23nFe4SYdfd3__fuYfhxH351-XwNJnzfMO7xqBCMq8uOVawFHNIdQCASsV9IT7rITquBi40HNwGK_ZNMEuIoyyASv7zig5jEI3m5VBeClA9xq61Wi5GJC-77Twy-DU49GgvWFiEFpKIbVuO7X2_RCMGr0yHjpmBASkXFragODj6hqv_ILS-pyaaDeiozL9h6mJqalSLgi1JZfOFsLJ1HQ_Ymq6a5iaxHCHZGr6srhLvF6VIHHKPIILvBv5kLg7Ke855bPyDSL6fBAU_sYYVizAC9Qj7xU47kjoCF_A1NQUG443xoj10TMjnslh_O6k39l9WfU_AAD__4gXjy4).
## Miracle Baby Goes Home
A baby born at 22 weeks and five days in Houston defied the odds, [graduating from the neonatal intensive care unit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_u4yAQhJ_G7mzBgv8VFNe4y7VXWhiWeCUwEWzi5O1POd0b_OoZzej7_ty2m6VI5_23TWj4HfJ24lUjMmPZdrt_drRcs_e1oKfKhRzTuYGAoRNzJ9TmLcXPpltvduEX2aKR06BBzotQ7WHcAiqoXSI4ELsenRyHWavJ4TgIG6Al8x0Ts1BSCqlUP0CYptlrWBxoh0OjBXriXHo-kPFta4if_MLSu5zaaA7mR23UrwbWBtbruvqQ3zAe-Vk5n99SA-uXqoE1UbEuYvc_7BK5kh8FMRF292L90zLWLpScupPcsy3GPy6Kkeo4NVrck6X475d_Zutl4G8AAAD__xQygPc) and heading home healthy with her parents. Ada Bishop, who was born at The Woman's Hospital of Texas and was later transferred to Texas Children's Hospital, was born at just 1 pound, 4 ounces. She was transferred to the NICU to receive specialized care after birth, including a tracheostomy. The intensive care allowed Bishop to develop healthily over the course of nearly a year, until her release. You can see a video of her special graduation ceremony [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOpBZDDaFi7-hy99eiYy9hJVsjOxNSN7-lNO9wdUzmtH3fd2Wm6VAx_2_jWj4taXlwKsEZMa8rHZ9r2i5JO9LRk-FMzmmYwEBQyN0I_rFWwrvRdberMJPXY2mU4OETk-ir3cDa7dJMYrJglDjqMbB-VVp7DWoQTtXk_mMCS36rhNd37cDbEppL2FyIB0OlRToiVNueUfGly1beKcn5talWAezM5-l6v9VMFcwX9fVbukF454ehdPxKVUwf6gqmCNl6wI2v2ETyeV0ZsRI2Nyz9Q_LWJotp9gc5B6tjWedjT8vCoHKqCop7tFS-Pnmvxl7GvgOAAD__8Tbghc).

clean_body: A baby born at 22 weeks and five days in Houston defied the odds, and heading home healthy with her parents. | | | | | | Sunday, August 3, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1940, Pro Football Hall of Fame wide receiver was born in Houston. Nicknamed Bambi, Alworth played nine seasons with the San Diego Chargers before playing his final two with the Dallas Cowboys, helping the team win its first Super Bowl. Speaking of hall of famers, some South Texans met one during a visit to a local market. See photos , and read more about it in Et Cetera. New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Lottery Dispute Ends in Settlement The Texas Lottery a woman $45.89 million to settle a lawsuit over its denial of her $83.5 million jackpot payout. Kristen Moriarty, who picked all six numbers for an $83.5 million jackpot, was denied her winnings after Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick visited the store where she bought the ticket. Lottery officials subsequently refused to provide Moriarty her winnings, citing the pending investigation, which prompted Moriarty to sue the Commission's Executive Director. Moriarty was awarded $45.89 million on Wednesday, two days before the scheduled hearing in court. You can find the full settlement . Firefighting Goes Autonomous Texas could be the first state to see fully , thanks to research by Texas A&M University and the U.S. Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency. With $60 million in funding, the partnership's goal is to convert traditional UH-60 Blackhawks into AI-powered aircrafts that can fight fires without a pilot. The choppers will be able to carry out water drops, supply deliveries, and aerial surveillance in places too risky for human crews. The helicopters will be developed and tested over the next two years and will involve several emergency response teams from across the state. Read the full story . Miracle Baby Goes Home A baby born at 22 weeks and five days in Houston defied the odds, and heading home healthy with her parents. Ada Bishop, who was born at The Woman's Hospital of Texas and was later transferred to Texas Children's Hospital, was born at just 1 pound, 4 ounces. She was transferred to the NICU to receive specialized care after birth, including a tracheostomy. The intensive care allowed Bishop to develop healthily over the course of nearly a year, until her release. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fd815a7-4a23-4edc-9b85-1b7bf71e5c6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

| | |
# [Tell Trump: "Don't blame the numbers, you just suck at running the economy"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5387b42-0519-4eb7-b5be-49cafc6f591a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Jobs are disappearing. Trade is collapsing. And unemployment and inflation are rising again. It's truly awe inspiring how much damage Trump has done in just 6 months. **And yet, he refuses to take blame.** He actually [fired the person who gave him the numbers](https://default.salsalabs.org/T976d895d-438a-49fc-bea8-09506e9a96d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), because Trump can't handle the truth. And the truth is that he sucks at running the economy. So please join us in sending him a message: [**Tell Trump: "Don't blame the numbers, you just suck at running the economy"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c2e96f7-f99c-40d5-be14-b067d2613bb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Congresswoman Nancy Mace
subject: Join Nancy Mace Tomorrow! You're Invited
disclaimer_text: paid for by hard working South Carolinians
body:
Please join Nancy Mace TOMORROW for a VERY SPECIAL announcement! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/nancy-mace-to-give-special-announcement-10348330?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
## **YOU’RE INVITED TO A SPECIAL ADDRESS WITH CONGRESSWOMAN NANCY MACE**
---
| [RSVP!](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=f6d46f2497&e=ddc57b5ede "RSVP!")
---
| **WHAT:**
SPECIAL ANNOUNCEMENT!
God's not done with South Carolina, and neither is Nancy Mace.

**WHEN:**
Monday, August 4, 2025
Doors Open at 7:00 AM ET
Remarks begin at 7:30 AM ET

**WHERE:**
Capers Courtyard at The Citadel, The Military College of South Carolina
1 Lee Ave, Charleston, SC 29403

This is a public, outdoor event.
**SOUTH CAROLINA FIRST.**
---
| [RSVP!](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=a1e95c564e&e=ddc57b5ede "RSVP!")
---
| I’ve always fought for what’s right, even when it wasn’t easy. Doing what’s right often means doing what is hard. Whether it was breaking barriers as the first female graduate of The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets, or standing up in Washington to lower taxes, protect women and children and bring back law and order and common sense. I’ve done it for one reason: because I love South Carolina. But now, our state is at a crossroads.
---
| [RSVP!](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=09d0138709&e=ddc57b5ede "RSVP!")
---
| South Carolina continues to face the same challenges as we have for decades. And we ask ourselves, to what end? High taxes, turning a blind eye to sanctuary policies, allowing illegals to run wild in our state, few prosecutions if any, nearly last in the nation in education and the indoctrination of mentally ill ideology into our schools at every level. All paid for by hard working South Carolinians. Congresswoman Mace is considering a decision she never anticipated, but one she knows is necessary for the future of South Carolina.
---
| [RSVP!](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=5bea0b024b&e=ddc57b5ede "RSVP!")

subject: Tammy Duckworth just EXPOSED Trump’s plot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
“Lying thieves. All of them.”
| **_Tammy Duckworth EXPOSED Trump’s plot to DESTROY Social Security:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92710?t=6&akid=20802%2E878179%2ERETBga) This isn’t an empty warning — it’s a CALL TO ACTION. We won’t sit by and let our earned benefits be STOLEN by MAGA billionaires!

[Join Democrats like Tammy Duckworth in FIGHTING BACK: Chip in $7 to confirm your spot on our Social Security Task Force! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92710?t=7&akid=20802%2E878179%2ERETBga) | [CALLING ON YOU: RUSH $7 TO JOIN THE SOCIAL SECURITY TASK FORCE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92715?t=8&akid=20802%2E878179%2ERETBga)

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: How to spot Shapiro's "word salad"
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=153f747adb&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Shapiro refuses to tell us if he’ll protect women’s sports](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=48396ca1d7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Rep. Joe D’Orsie and Guy Ciarrocchi_
Governor Shapiro was finally asked if he’d sign Senate Bill 9, “The Save Women’s Sports Act,” which would ensure that only biological females can play competitive women’s sports.

His non-answer and partisan attack embody that of a slick salesman. “What we do not need in Pennsylvania are politicians — extremists politicians like Trump and Mastriano, and these others — trying to legislate a student’s participation...” Yet, he declined to say if he’d veto the bill: “It’s a hypothetical...and, I haven’t reviewed it specifically.”

Well, he has reviewed it... and bringing up Trump and Mastriano on legislation that affects over one million Pennsylvania girls is deflection to the nth degree.

**Why It Matters.** As an emerging Democratic presidential darling, Josh Shapiro, who prides himself on bipartisan agreement, finds himself amidst the mere 20 percent of Americans who believe girls’ sports should be dominated by biological males. A 2025 New York Times/Ipsos poll found that 79 percent of Americans do not support men invading girls’ sports fields, courts, and locker rooms, even 67 percent of Democrats hold this belief. (We believe that the numbers are even higher.) Senate Bill 9, the Save Women’s Sports Act, carried the support of five Senate Democrats, which is good for over 20 percent of the Democratic caucus.

The only sensible conclusion, then, is that the Governor picks and chooses when the “bipartisan” hat might be politically useful. With this strange betrayal of Pennsylvania women and girls, he has sided with far-left political ideologues — betraying not just girl athletes, but Democrats, Independents, and Republicans alike.

80/20 issues are few and far between, but 70/30 issues are almost as rare. School choice is one of those issues – one that 70 percent of Pennsylvanians support – and one that Governor Shapiro has failed to deliver on.
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=be6e30bc56&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Delco spent $4.7M on outside lawyers in 2024, dwarfing neighboring counties](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d872caf87b&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Todd Shepherd_
Delaware County spent $4.69 million on outside attorneys in 2024, according to an analysis of[ documents](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=85f1751aba&e=b7b3eddce2) obtained via Right to Know request — more than eleven times higher than 2019, the last full year that category of spending was under Republican control. The 2024 figure is a record high for outside counsel spending, surpassing the previous record set in 2023. The total shows that while the rate of increase in that category has leveled out, there are as yet no signs that the county intends to lower that spending so that it would be more commensurate with earlier years or with what neighboring counties spend. Additionally, the increase in outside spending has not resulted in any interior savings. According to the county’s[ 2024 budget](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=aa3aa5da0e&e=b7b3eddce2), the line-item for the county solicitor’s office has skyrocketed from $1.64 million in 2020 to $3.99 million in 2024 — a 143 percent increase. **Why It Matters.** This latest fact lands as the county is just four months away from its first county council election in the wake of a massive[ 24 percent tax increase](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1a62a70cf8&e=b7b3eddce2) levied on residents in December of last year that set off waves of public complaints. The 24 percent tax increase followed a five percent tax increase just one year earlier. Those tensions were on display recently when Councilwoman Christine Reuther voted no on purchasing new electroshock weapons for the county’s park police. “I feel very stressed about voting no but ... I’m going to feel stressed about laying people off or cutting benefits or cutting services,”[ Reuther said](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=77c3391b97&e=b7b3eddce2) earlier this month. The Democrats who campaigned for council seats in 2017 and 2019 and then into the early years of this decade promised to create a county health department as well as to deprivatize the county prison, which had previously been privately run for almost 30 years. After winning a majority, they delivered on those promises, but many residents are left wondering if the changes were worth the expense, especially after the mammoth 24 percent tax increase last year. The increase was a stunning reversal on[ pledges](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=109fd2d6dc&e=b7b3eddce2) to keep taxes level from council members like Brian Madden. For example, as _Broad + Liberty_ previously reported, In 2021, the prison’s[ total bill](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=873f19d850&e=b7b3eddce2) for outside legal help was $125,375. By 2024,[ that bill climbed](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3387756a26&e=b7b3eddce2) to $967,598.
[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=54bfb1ea37&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Feds declare bathroom policies illegal — 63 percent of Philly-area schools could be next](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ea43c2d4a0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Wally Nunn: Councilwoman Reuther finally tells the truth — sort of](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b68afaff40&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Chris Holbert: A better way forward on cannabis for Pennsylvania Republicans](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2346625378&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Matt Meyers: Don’t lock out opportunity — TRIO cuts are class warfare on college dreams](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=15fd542c9a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Kyle Sammin: The only thing better than a closed primary is no primary](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0cfb7783f6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Dick Allen — A Hall of Famer in baseball and in life](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1cb0045534&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Two Philadelphia mansions ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3dc6d67d1c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: Buyer beware of home improvement fraud](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=33d397d504&e=b7b3eddce2)**

|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
Doug Mastriano is looking at another run for governor and many Republicans — including President Trump, according to some sources — are nervous. So writes [Holly Otterbein in _POLITICO_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6dc2d5660c&e=b7b3eddce2) this week in a deep dive into the political fortunes of the central Pennsylvania state senator who lost by fifteen percentage points to Democrat Josh Shapiro in 2022. Beyond defeating Shapiro, Republicans have hopes of retaining marginal US House seats — hopes that could be jeopardized by an unpopular nominee atop the ticket. “If he’s our nominee, we lose four House seats,” GOP consultant Josh Novotney told Otterbein. “He’s a nightmare that no one wants.”

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Rep. Joe D’Orsie and Guy Ciarrocchi Governor Shapiro was finally asked if he’d sign Senate Bill 9, “The Save Women’s Sports Act,” which would ensure that only biological females can play competitive women’s sports. His non-answer and partisan attack embody that of a slick salesman. “What we do not need in Pennsylvania are politicians — extremists politicians like Trump and Mastriano, and these others — trying to legislate a student’s participation...” Yet, he declined to say if he’d veto the bill: “It’s a hypothetical...and, I haven’t reviewed it specifically.” Well, he has reviewed it... and bringing up Trump and Mastriano on legislation that affects over one million Pennsylvania girls is deflection to the nth degree. Why It Matters. As an emerging Democratic presidential darling, Josh Shapiro, who prides himself on bipartisan agreement, finds himself amidst the mere 20 percent of Americans who believe girls’ sports should be dominated by biological males. A 2025 New York Times/Ipsos poll found that 79 percent of Americans do not support men invading girls’ sports fields, courts, and locker rooms, even 67 percent of Democrats hold this belief. (We believe that the numbers are even higher.) Senate Bill 9, the Save Women’s Sports Act, carried the support of five Senate Democrats, which is good for over 20 percent of the Democratic caucus. The only sensible conclusion, then, is that the Governor picks and chooses when the “bipartisan” hat might be politically useful. With this strange betrayal of Pennsylvania women and girls, he has sided with far-left political ideologues — betraying not just girl athletes, but Democrats, Independents, and Republicans alike. 80/20 issues are few and far between, but 70/30 issues are almost as rare. School choice is one of those issues – one that 70 percent of Pennsylvanians support – and one that Governor Shapiro has failed to deliver on. | | 2. By Todd Shepherd Delaware County spent $4.69 million on outside attorneys in 2024, according to an analysis of obtained via Right to Know request — more than eleven times higher than 2019, the last full year that category of spending was under Republican control. The 2024 figure is a record high for outside counsel spending, surpassing the previous record set in 2023. The total shows that while the rate of increase in that category has leveled out, there are as yet no signs that the county intends to lower that spending so that it would be more commensurate with earlier years or with what neighboring counties spend. Additionally, the increase in outside spending has not resulted in any interior savings. According to the county’s, the line-item for the county solicitor’s office has skyrocketed from $1.64 million in 2020 to $3.99 million in 2024 — a 143 percent increase. Why It Matters. This latest fact lands as the county is just four months away from its first county council election in the wake of a massive levied on residents in December of last year that set off waves of public complaints. The 24 percent tax increase followed a five percent tax increase just one year earlier. Those tensions were on display recently when Councilwoman Christine Reuther voted no on purchasing new electroshock weapons for the county’s park police. “I feel very stressed about voting no but ... I’m going to feel stressed about laying people off or cutting benefits or cutting services,” earlier this month. The Democrats who campaigned for council seats in 2017 and 2019 and then into the early years of this decade promised to create a county health department as well as to deprivatize the county prison, which had previously been privately run for almost 30 years. After winning a majority, they delivered on those promises, but many residents are left wondering if the changes were worth the expense, especially after the mammoth 24 percent tax increase last year. The increase was a stunning reversal on to keep taxes level from council members like Brian Madden. For example, as Broad + Liberty previously reported, In 2021, the prison’s for outside legal help was $125,375. By 2024, to $967,598. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. What we're reading Doug Mastriano is looking at another run for governor and many Republicans — including President Trump, according to some sources — are nervous. So writes this week in a deep dive into the political fortunes of the central Pennsylvania state senator who lost by fifteen percentage points to Democrat Josh Shapiro in 2022. Beyond defeating Shapiro, Republicans have hopes of retaining marginal US House seats — hopes that could be jeopardized by an unpopular nominee atop the ticket. “If he’s our nominee, we lose four House seats,” GOP consultant Josh Novotney told Otterbein. “He’s a nightmare that no one wants.” | | | Broad + Liberty is funded by readers like you. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. Trump wants to privatize it, New Dems are fighting to protect it

| **Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.****** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112648947/561187829/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250803_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjMyNjliZi02OTcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZV2PYMbIHZdyJXR80KZvtllAgVZtvHi7BjBn526keKk=&emci=233c7ba3-e86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=123269bf-6970-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112648951/561187838/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250803_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjMyNjliZi02OTcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZV2PYMbIHZdyJXR80KZvtllAgVZtvHi7BjBn526keKk=&emci=233c7ba3-e86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=123269bf-6970-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)
---
**The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities.**

It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans.
It ensures every American — _no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility_ — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting.

**And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in _fairness_.**

That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally.

New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, _not turn a profit for the privileged few._

**[If you agree that the USPS should stay in the hands of the people, add your name now and stand with us in this fight! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112648954/561187843/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250803_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjMyNjliZi02OTcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZV2PYMbIHZdyJXR80KZvtllAgVZtvHi7BjBn526keKk=&emci=233c7ba3-e86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=123269bf-6970-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**
[ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112648957/561187873/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250803_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjMyNjliZi02OTcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZV2PYMbIHZdyJXR80KZvtllAgVZtvHi7BjBn526keKk=&emci=233c7ba3-e86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=123269bf-6970-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)

body:
Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, August 3rd, 2025. | | |
---
