📢 **_Democrats Speak Out:_ _MeidasTouch_ and DLCC Spotlight Strength of State Dems **
Last week, President Heather Williams joined _MeidasTouch_ to discuss the strength of state Democrats who are showing up in their communities, having real conversations with voters, and overperforming in special elections. [Watch the interview here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvCJWuY8d94dcjPqDwz3RaXYfngcn4o5-M-b3sIk2uwEVSEm9-pcj8QLg-pvsmKbL3DE46Barfp0DlS3vw9zUT-60F5GWZNFuYamHj2zAlJaXmPiV-Kr5y2boL9WcQF3ObAyVQ96rMtm4op6aQxn0DQ04PwD91qMcs7CMwOlyxwlHMQ9Zvl3hPYtbAaDiazVU1LX9CBFP8T6bA2JlrkCNFG85TnrKnrq42Dol6KtBE_vj7aRY8oqoRHnK1WsRfNeWlLs-FUjBVFpjhcbMRmKGKZsAvzMRlrmxXuhLuGPpaCp6JZTtOMcEFLSpaHiI6KvqV__FN5bA4_QhC2DxLSMRFTV5vzY_Mn2bt8yEyD6FCv2KDzJ7tW0Yw87xLPSRDDssvnADVXeQ4ZRCG8iXVVMqFE3YrZ4OO7sAAMR8tzhZb-WTL9YSCMue3rt0GQXHANeV8Z_WluIyfgF3dL6CphOmJbWX68BJCYgmGtUV_--7f3UWLfjcLATj1aAsqQkwU_a9iole1FiLb4jx6YEcyL65kQ5-ZgKwHHHzZ2RQ4vCYoT0E55Bd0fZdoxyhhTJS69wpK9_vCROlTmSUVAJl9ugLsEeFy97nEbVSYuJjKoLz0WWlw/4iq/xSfywaidT_OkTrSZTYwKTA/h1/h001.pcL5yNxx9HJ0WsZ0CoaBvP4pnSOHqtrXLYiiNTJeVTc)
🚨 **_Gerrymandering Alert:_ Texas Republicans propose congressional maps that could give them five additional seats **
The White House reportedly pressured Texas Republicans to redraw the state’s congressional districts to produce five additional GOP seats to help protect Republicans’ narrow House majority. Republicans currently hold 25 out of the state’s 38 districts — meaning [the map is already heavily gerrymandered in their favor → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMTUVOgEGN6S_UN_3mYQ_j8PvdOEUkCloMopNw_sEbMsiAaNEWnX3d4fn2DxoSnxriUsA2K2DbsMnwZLwX0fDB2g7ZDUYTFC6xrCVo0H0NZS0RmpA-Qa1F5ByuXFyoJH-QRBMZHNPwsH0weEUkkil4a5-Qy98yG0-JnRRj5KiXiQgXF9NdoFgKj2GQ6XBMc1OuA8KQfw0BQQK3UtAN_Pe0yiF0H_7xQU3sza0aZNlzOSuJ5Pq7XWqP_ThlzOk4MCcSvtUa6XUNRJVro25BZSZPOvjtgtH0DYvfaasmuXHEL3h8PldgDo9rmXC17LdRCga28FCxBvU4Hg668TxJeu4SiuSgawieLYt5SA4m1lRLAV2NNtfL7UbBXRVBmg_33i5iuplNoxT9FGSkhLi-a6dDowKbMAVJYWVG6dYHdwe-Yx59DpPShj01ttWFyCrr1MWmApK8pHwcvMUxlnUzou-NiqvPvtq9mbzoPi4-E61b-LhAzLGgdfN3OEegyell3TTnxOSEAm4Rh7XBDeQm9ncPLnrfmmN1tp8VLpJdpNEJJ65ChGwyEsh68n_tbQDVPCNJJX86qR5VsxpCqQQNqCWIxxe-Dn7D9d88YuYi6llNQz_tEHGR7AlD3neRoGPyGCJbE1WXsW8YXUS0ADH2ZfObwkQ03dHiLIe5yCiAtX5CVVf/4iq/xSfywaidT_OkTrSZTYwKTA/h2/h001.zrIPQOnI8-aF5MWnzjtOcCi2l0RQLQwQIHxW_mQmW_Q)
🗳️ **_Iowa:_ Democrats set out to break GOP Senate supermajority **
Democrats prepare for a special election to the Iowa Senate on August 26th against an extreme anti-abortion opponent who likened reproductive freedom to the Holocaust. [Flipping this seat would break the toxic GOP supermajority in the chamber → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pAec_R2GLLiyEObrvaZNygJaWXFkO0ZjdJ56NeNnge-i_hlhB-A4fLzRwzo2wN6HDSF7xW4whglp8DCqf7JD9BEo7qD1-A3iYx3sEDEO3fAApRk7GakYGnwidD1IK2v540hNWz5sg9-g5RcN45V7d4ETyjVI3OIUXcEAHYCC0B6ZX09LJubH3-76liTGzX5xO5oyW1SOAmShB2p2aV7kKu47Avr4mvfkZswsNx2UTaJqzNzn8mYp00UwIVnkESNBCd1T48SY_JJXdueRz8fNuOE2tw-2z4uPi00oSAGv12IFqrnRKjF442fMor6v4IwM3o717vR9SfXrgaMV7bJHLmJNDVLJNMM0-f0rKLzW7Xqpj2od_bJlpNzfN3TVa_dqTaQwWEXpV8GcGqwLCiGPAkoP0x4IkLIH7BDxRfw-XFwaeaI6-fFwEnxI4V2LdudDoXK9_sNirBmdSjf_Ho1iF_Lr2COLGJZ5leatLfCFPrXw3cRgRe0Bl5GNlFyZifplKOLCy_K87qjVwEn3C3IwbP5Mo06vDAaNpKWKeqc-DCLcdlbQQhev5qgbHR7Fy_pUvHFf-v3jeGgiPTejr67ao_tC4xCMgbGr4U6Mtph3CjiRfExOesPT7hrp6O-jnpL9aQ/4iq/xSfywaidT_OkTrSZTYwKTA/h3/h001.p8GDVHPxVLhD1OO3FOThtPmG3DbUkVu3UbMuNf1YzRk)
🔦 **_Spotlight:_ Del. Nadarius Clark prepares to defend his seat in the VA House **
The DLCC announced Del. Nadarius Clark as a Spotlight Candidate in his race to defend his seat in the Virginia House. When he won his seat in 2021, he was the youngest Democratic delegate ever elected. He’s been a champion in the fight for equitable access to education, housing, and health care. [Learn more about Del. Nadarius Clark here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW7iyz3WnsgDWJUDLbGMRg-n15CROQvdAXoD-JSeQ0hSeT2CAjz_bhm8WQgj9ripNYeDWfrlqnTuuuI5ltNYJcyL1uQAzkHeTKisB58VV0HP1SmO0W0X3iXoxhdVCO2DdWF0dJ2DTaCjTjHkmHJ1cDDDUddAaXZH5eOuoJ-erx50-sSMs-oKEC-H8vcbj--YyFxE5O4h3b3xYtkvKIGrTMlNUs4OkslhWojpy6dXF_7Kfp2YN8lwm4T3d-KsbcDk0oAYkPvSi9L-K73_kHDlcz1y2b6LgqHZFpwH7LMapAvAO_2DEz2Brejb85JQuwhxi8Z7dek7kesl5F91N6JzFavygKdqs7ZVV3bk0DYm9pk4xhFIx6QNNZqDqHfF2knK1wvfb2lCwYxVttFe0xgsaO3ppGSYwz1GUqo1MAAUOE_R6tvEJZAFb2slmdnhK9wk7VvH4nhWJZ_M8yWt-p4Geq0JA4c7c4W_4lnoyVDB09jZgiXRfspdWCqlnb9KGIg319wVFc9cNEoAjb_nG9caBrwx0DIZZbfEmfHvW3kU3xB2kesDS033FFuwO-33jJMBHZpHrXO6RhUecDL_r8vE_Jkk/4iq/xSfywaidT_OkTrSZTYwKTA/h4/h001.Ke2i9k8L6QjgJB0iNKkGw2Es9iwo2QbCrmiyox8bnG8)
**🗳️ _Upcoming elections:_ Democrats work to build progressive power **
State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. [**With Trump and his MAGA allies assaulting our democracy, Democrats are making key investments to elect state legislators who can block the MAGA agenda. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, August 3rd, 2025. | | | | | | 📢 Democrats Speak Out: MeidasTouch and DLCC Spotlight Strength of State Dems Last week, President Heather Williams joined MeidasTouch to discuss the strength of state Democrats who are showing up in their communities, having real conversations with voters, and overperforming in special elections. 🚨 Gerrymandering Alert: Texas Republicans propose congressional maps that could give them five additional seats The White House reportedly pressured Texas Republicans to redraw the state’s congressional districts to produce five additional GOP seats to help protect Republicans’ narrow House majority. Republicans currently hold 25 out of the state’s 38 districts — meaning 🗳️ Iowa: Democrats set out to break GOP Senate supermajority Democrats prepare for a special election to the Iowa Senate on August 26th against an extreme anti-abortion opponent who likened reproductive freedom to the Holocaust. 🔦 Spotlight: Del. Nadarius Clark prepares to defend his seat in the VA House The DLCC announced Del. Nadarius Clark as a Spotlight Candidate in his race to defend his seat in the Virginia House. When he won his seat in 2021, he was the youngest Democratic delegate ever elected. He’s been a champion in the fight for equitable access to education, housing, and health care. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. subject: Our race is the biggest election since Trump returned to power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Here are three reasons why you should make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia.
#
Peter, if you've been waiting to make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia, now's the moment. Here are three reasons why:
✅ Our race is the biggest election since Trump returned to power.
✅ Republicans have spent over $1 million on TV and digital ads so far.
✅ And if we win big here, it will give a big boost to Democrats heading into 2026.
Here in Virginia, there is no limit to how much individuals can donate to candidates for office. For that reason, our opponent has been raking in money from far-right megadonors.
_Our average online donation is around $30, but what's more important is the number of people who pitch in._
**[If you're with us, don't wait another day! Split a contribution of $5 or even more between Abigail Spanberger's campaign and State Democrats Committee to help us build a winning campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93198?refcode=em20250803-9214&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9214%2E614464%2Ed664Ty)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93199?refcode=em20250803-9214&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9214%2E614464%2Ed664Ty) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93199?refcode=em20250803-9214&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=9214%2E614464%2Ed664Ty) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93199?refcode=em20250803-9214&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9214%2E614464%2Ed664Ty) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93199?refcode=em20250803-9214&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9214%2E614464%2Ed664Ty) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93199?refcode=em20250803-9214&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9214%2E614464%2Ed664Ty) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93199?refcode=em20250803-9214&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9214%2E614464%2Ed664Ty) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93198?refcode=em20250803-9214&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9214%2E614464%2Ed664Ty)

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Join a Special Back-to-School Discussion on August 12!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Hear from school shooting survivors and responsible gun owners.
#

Friend,
Did you know that 4.6 million minors live in homes with at least one, unlocked firearm?
Gun violence poses a serious threat to our children and teachers. **That’s why GIFFORDS and our partners at Teachers Unify are hosting a** [**back-to-school discussion on school safety on August 12.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/63747?t=1&akid=10743%2E3935704%2ElHx5NU)
Secure gun storage is crucial to reducing the risk of gun violence, and it’s an essential component of our [GIFFORDS Gun Owners for Safety](https://go.giffords.org/go/4150?t=2&akid=10743%2E3935704%2ElHx5NU) educational program. Our schools should focus on educating kids and parents about the dangers of unsecured firearms and the importance of secure storage—not arming teachers.
Join us on [Tuesday, August 12, at 7 pm ET/4 pm PT](https://go.giffords.org/go/63747?t=3&akid=10743%2E3935704%2ElHx5NU) for an in-depth discussion with responsible gun owners and teachers about school shootings, youth suicides, and interpersonal conflicts, and how parents and students can play a role in reducing risk and saving lives.
_**You can RSVP here:**_
**[RSVP](https://go.giffords.org/go/63747?t=4&akid=10743%2E3935704%2ElHx5NU)**
Incidents with guns in schools regularly leave our nation shocked and searching for solutions. **But we know what to do—we just need to elect leaders and take action to make our schools a safer place for our children.**
Please join us to learn more about how you can be part of the school safety solution!
In solidarity,
Shannon
--
Shannon Flores
Gun Owners for Safety

**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/63913?t=5&akid=10743%2E3935704%2ElHx5NU)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=10743%2E3935704%2ElHx5NU) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

He talked about how some folks criticize Israel and end up siding with Hamas, a terrorist group. He said Hamas is spreading lies, trying to make people think Israel is starving people in Gaza. Look, here are [...] | Trump Imposes New Tariffs on Canadian Imports Last night, President Trump made a big move. He signed an order that raises taxes, called tariffs, on things we buy from Canada to 35%. That change starts right at midnight. But he gave Mexico a little more time—another 90 days—to make a deal with us. Trump’s tough talk comes because we want better trade [...] | | | | A massive, historic success. | Trump Drops Hammer After Shocking New Report - You Won't Believe Who Gets The Boot Who's really controlling the numbers? | Trump Drops Hammer After Shocking New Report - You Won't Believe Who Gets The Boot Who's really controlling the numbers? | Trump Deploys America's Deadliest Deterrent After Russia's 'Dead Hand' Threat Donald's not messing around. | Disturbing New Footage Shows Biden's Stunning New Speech - He Has Completely Lost It Oh boy, this was bad... | P.O. body:

---
**Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21726/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/42cc44b1e124ee326cf2a0cc866dbef7a3a2366c). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X... You get MORE power... You get FASTER recharging... And it can even power your FRIDGE! It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2500X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21726/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/42cc44b1e124ee326cf2a0cc866dbef7a3a2366c) is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight. Plug in the solar panel. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun! Amazingly, it takes just 90 minutes to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **ORDER TODAY AND GET 15 FREE GIFTS WORTH $1,391.70!**

name: Protect Care Workers via Care in Action
subject: Trump’s Immigration Crackdown is hurting care workers – Demand Congress protect TPS now!
body:
Care workers who had been protected now face sweeping raids, detention, and deportation.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112663103/561220412/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=protect-tps-holders-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NiMzk1MS03NjcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GuZ3rf65cIeLHWlqPjFczPu409aH-ZkGlObugAXIx0w=&emci=998a82de-fa6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=33cb3951-7670-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
The Trump administration’s brutal immigration crackdown is hitting nursing homes and home care agencies *hard*, **ripping essential care workers from their families and communities and leaving vulnerable seniors and people with disabilities with an urgent question: who will take care of them?**
Right now, thousands of Temporary Protected Status (TPS) holders work tirelessly as part of our care community. For decades, they have paid taxes, contributed to our communities, and cared for our loved ones - feeding, bathing, and comforting the people we treasure most. But then **Trump moved to strip away their protections overnight in order to round up and deport them** , at a moment when our country is already facing a care worker shortage.
Members of Congress on both sides of the aisle have expressed concern about this betrayal of TPS holders. **But now it’s up to all of us to create enough public outrage that they have no choice but to act.**
[**Tell Congress: Don’t turn your back on the caregivers who keep America running. Protect TPS holders now!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112663104/561220413/133317628?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=protect-tps-holders-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NiMzk1MS03NjcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GuZ3rf65cIeLHWlqPjFczPu409aH-ZkGlObugAXIx0w=&emci=998a82de-fa6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=33cb3951-7670-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[Add Your Name](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112663105/561220414/133317628?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=protect-tps-holders-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NiMzk1MS03NjcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GuZ3rf65cIeLHWlqPjFczPu409aH-ZkGlObugAXIx0w=&emci=998a82de-fa6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=33cb3951-7670-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Since 1990, Temporary Protected Status (TPS) has existed as a humanitarian program, allowing people who cannot safely return to their home countries to live and work in the United States. 1.1 million TPS holders now live here, deeply engrained into our communities – doing essential work and paying billions in taxes.
But then Trump began moving to rip away lawful status for TPS holders as part of his mass deportation machine. His administration targeted **hundreds of thousands of people from Haiti, Honduras, El Salvador, Venezuela, Nepal, Nicaragua, and Sudan** and signaled that other countries could be next. Families who had lived here for decades were suddenly thrown into uncertainty, forced to prepare for raids, detention, and deportation.
**TPS holders who had been protected now faced sweeping raids, detention, and deportation**. A mother of two was deported alongside her 15-month-old U.S. citizen child. Another mother was separated from her 11-month old daughter, despite having a pending asylum application.
Make no mistake: **this is a national care crisis unfolding in real time**. With our rapidly aging population, every lost worker means families scrambling, corners cut, and quality of care at risk.
**The good news is that Congress has the power to stop this**. A group of 31 Democratic Senators recently reintroduced a bill that would provide those TPS holders with a path to legal permanent residency. A bipartisan group has formed to try to ensure Venezuelans can continue to have TPS.
But unless Congress hears from a groundswell of people, Trump will win this fight too. **Which is why _all_ of us need to speak out now, before more families are ripped apart and millions more Americans lose the care they depend on.**
[**Click here to send an urgent message to Congress: Protect TPS status and care workers across the country, NOW!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112663106/561220415/133317628?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=protect-tps-holders-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NiMzk1MS03NjcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GuZ3rf65cIeLHWlqPjFczPu409aH-ZkGlObugAXIx0w=&emci=998a82de-fa6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=33cb3951-7670-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[Add Your Name](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112663107/561220416/133317628?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=protect-tps-holders-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NiMzk1MS03NjcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GuZ3rf65cIeLHWlqPjFczPu409aH-ZkGlObugAXIx0w=&emci=998a82de-fa6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=33cb3951-7670-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
TPS holders are our neighbors, friends, and care workers. But now their lives have been destroyed overnight – and all of us will feel the impact. Let’s raise our voices together and make sure Congress hears loud and clear: Protect TPS holders. Protect care. Protect our communities.
As always, thanks for all you do,
The Care in Action Team

clean_body: Care workers who had been protected now face sweeping raids, detention, and deportation. The Trump administration’s brutal immigration crackdown is hitting nursing homes and home care agencies hard, ripping essential care workers from their families and communities and leaving vulnerable seniors and people with disabilities with an urgent question: who will take care of them? Right now, thousands of Temporary Protected Status (TPS) holders work tirelessly as part of our care community. For decades, they have paid taxes, contributed to our communities, and cared for our loved ones - feeding, bathing, and comforting the people we treasure most. But then Trump moved to strip away their protections overnight in order to round up and deport them , at a moment when our country is already facing a care worker shortage. Members of Congress on both sides of the aisle have expressed concern about this betrayal of TPS holders. But now it’s up to all of us to create enough public outrage that they have no choice but to act. Since 1990, Temporary Protected Status (TPS) has existed as a humanitarian program, allowing people who cannot safely return to their home countries to live and work in the United States. 1.1 million TPS holders now live here, deeply engrained into our communities – doing essential work and paying billions in taxes. But then Trump began moving to rip away lawful status for TPS holders as part of his mass deportation machine. His administration targeted hundreds of thousands of people from Haiti, Honduras, El Salvador, Venezuela, Nepal, Nicaragua, and Sudan and signaled that other countries could be next. Families who had lived here for decades were suddenly thrown into uncertainty, forced to prepare for raids, detention, and deportation. TPS holders who had been protected now faced sweeping raids, detention, and deportation. A mother of two was deported alongside her 15-month-old U.S. citizen child. Another mother was separated from her 11-month old daughter, despite having a pending asylum application. Make no mistake: this is a national care crisis unfolding in real time. With our rapidly aging population, every lost worker means families scrambling, corners cut, and quality of care at risk. The good news is that Congress has the power to stop this. A group of 31 Democratic Senators recently reintroduced a bill that would provide those TPS holders with a path to legal permanent residency. A bipartisan group has formed to try to ensure Venezuelans can continue to have TPS. But unless Congress hears from a groundswell of people, Trump will win this fight too. Which is why all of us need to speak out now, before more families are ripped apart and millions more Americans lose the care they depend on. TPS holders are our neighbors, friends, and care workers. But now their lives have been destroyed overnight – and all of us will feel the impact. Let’s raise our voices together and make sure Congress hears loud and clear: Protect TPS holders. Protect care. Protect our communities. As always, thanks for all you do, The Care in Action Team

Off the Sidelines PAC is working to elect Democrats who fight for working families — not private jets. But we don’t just raise money and run ads. We listen. We organize. We build a movement rooted in real people’s lives and priorities.
Would you put public dollars toward:
✅ Investing in affordable child care?
✅ Expanding Medicaid access?
✅ Better-funded public schools?
✅ Affordable housing or transit?
Whatever your answer, we want to hear it.
**We’re not just talking about what’s broken — we’re building real Democratic power to fix it.** Your voice shapes our mission and your input helps us organize smarter and fight back harder.

name: Lindsey
subject: I had no silver spoon
body:
I learned some tough lessons early on. |
---
I want to share something from the heart with you, Fellow American.

**_My story._**
It isn't one of glitz and glamour -- it's about hard work, loss, and fighting for what's right. I'm reaching out to tell you why I'm in this fight for our future, and why I need you with me.

Neither of my parents finished high school. But they were hardworking and determined that their children would surpass their achievements.

Most of my growing up happened on the main street of a small textile mill town. My parents had a business establishment -- a combination beer joint, restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall -- known as the Sanitary Cafe right on Main Street in Central, SC. We all lived in the back of the bar where we worked late into the evening, especially my mom, before heading off to bed in the backroom.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7383684b3eb14cb091d4d6c13e677579&_e=buB2H5iBVjagEBlBQ6r9ofPRnSZ8zj0706kIx7_aumlbD6qvvqbXq-tqGmpjbm3yVLwDzKAdA-v-9WnhnUCQa5iA7uiglGaZBPV_T_oSaYeZwBVCzma8XpwrZFlvBs4D4ATRR6siwyDTQIHOGmi73SkBvWRReUV0qELFSUBvy41YRsSuOOvT7TRkyJpKm484cql3HAyb_oriOidIAsuQO-h8RdFpEiIVf4cunl1EqAfrUfb8lvQL1wcqr9rYWTXjxf9T7C2QSmAmHOpt3gdVCKo9Tk_qG1k9Un86seAz2ByRhHyrYpOQtulHyHS79WPuXTZBrBQBWwoReY9-5qqHp2pSRH88ixa_dnCvbSpfryREM4QKumLSWMGviVHrOicO8JeV_4gryKoebl9-AmVmHtNHNMek3-v600ArMUZN5Qebr07sf-zur2GttAofZy-vEgyx5PBzypUU3Gp0e9d9Y7w47rYwG6qYfSeULIEqKOXREYepQEejHpLcsPJlAjEB7JNW2ijRoDT6ViCt24YdcCZJ5SHASc7yU9gp8692eqZq-jmsJdSoa-g3YM-8hwBC4kg3pTKVmVmDm2HWeca1NXkGmZ31eIKi68zyGVxhV6iyX0ekRWC8wMrKHz5TqbpErHoZwyapkKtK9YFzQJdFbHaH-CcIm-Ym3yNHMz3n5PEhE7teJhj4rItNIL_Zqd9Y) I had no silver spoon in my mouth but I never felt I was missing out on something because I didn't live in a house like my friends did. I had a great life, and it was a great way to grow up.

I was the first in my family to attend college, but then life hit me hard. While I was in school, I lost my mom and dad within two years of each other. And just like that, I stepped up to help raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, while coming back home on the weekends to help at our family business.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7383684b3eb14cb091d4d6c13e677579&_e=buB2H5iBVjagEBlBQ6r9ofPRnSZ8zj0706kIx7_aumlbD6qvvqbXq-tqGmpjbm3yVLwDzKAdA-v-9WnhnUCQa5iA7uiglGaZBPV_T_oSaYeZwBVCzma8XpwrZFlvBs4D4ATRR6siwyDTQIHOGmi73SkBvWRReUV0qELFSUBvy41YRsSuOOvT7TRkyJpKm484cql3HAyb_oriOidIAsuQO-h8RdFpEiIVf4cunl1EqAf4k0PiImVuEYHsX_nIHUA57gjetVb2-GJB3KGsgaElKWIqeyv5jUr3iZJ2LkV1tViEeCBxTfOA1jt31MfZPu3KTdhMV2w_wgAWVZpIJRspOOUCHa-L22EuxLg2kJInyEkoYzjL0pwSrBZWcyKtEDC-NbMFRmCMOeHVRF76pLnfxyN5A5HxVWoa3yXfVSM8MCqkQXQ96QoiyLKwcNmsrPSTWiCQv7-1upLvpINQ906pjGeZxnV9cYCKWUTgbrXD-JJhnlttHlTx121YuGcqpM0jp2crjdQutVYCvGpvZCB2m8lY4_NvtvYjvIr1a-xl5efekmEyItZz7or8s294v7j9HAd50MAR-zZ_Az_oMOCnJvthS4u6iVkKozDMIvq728dS8ti_mYIGJnj_q5J0aqgayXX_HQP5c8RQwCxrXV6Ytn4zy7OjHNsY1gWwGYo38Ku3w-yGDkaukDFwn6mGDOa6) **Fellow American, I learned some tough lessons early on.**

After law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a Judge Advocate General, serving as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after the people of South Carolina sent me to the United States Senate, I continued my service in the Air Force Reserves. I performed several short deployments in war zones like Afghanistan and Iraq, standing shoulder to shoulder with our brave men and women in uniform.

My story isn't all that different from yours or most people across this great country. I didn't have anything handed to me. I worked hard, grew up quickly, and took on big responsibilities.

**But what shaped me most was listening to the hard -working South Carolinians who'd come by our family business, sharing their hopes and struggles, or hearing the perspectives of my brave colleagues in the military.** _Whether I agreed with them or not, those conversations built my understanding of what Americans need and deserve._

Now, Fellow American, we all know our nation's in a tough spot -- we're divided, but there are some things we should agree on, plain and simple.

**🇺🇸 We need a country where you can raise your family without fear, where the streets are safe.**
**🇺🇸 We need a country where the American Dream isn't just a slogan.**
_It's alive, and every hard -working American has a real shot at it, no matter where they start._

clean_body: I learned some tough lessons early on. | I want to share something from the heart with you, Fellow American. My story. It isn't one of glitz and glamour -- it's about hard work, loss, and fighting for what's right. I'm reaching out to tell you why I'm in this fight for our future, and why I need you with me. Neither of my parents finished high school. But they were hardworking and determined that their children would surpass their achievements. Most of my growing up happened on the main street of a small textile mill town. My parents had a business establishment -- a combination beer joint, restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall -- known as the Sanitary Cafe right on Main Street in Central, SC. We all lived in the back of the bar where we worked late into the evening, especially my mom, before heading off to bed in the backroom. I had no silver spoon in my mouth but I never felt I was missing out on something because I didn't live in a house like my friends did. I had a great life, and it was a great way to grow up. I was the first in my family to attend college, but then life hit me hard. While I was in school, I lost my mom and dad within two years of each other. And just like that, I stepped up to help raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, while coming back home on the weekends to help at our family business. Fellow American, I learned some tough lessons early on. After law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a Judge Advocate General, serving as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after the people of South Carolina sent me to the United States Senate, I continued my service in the Air Force Reserves. I performed several short deployments in war zones like Afghanistan and Iraq, standing shoulder to shoulder with our brave men and women in uniform. My story isn't all that different from yours or most people across this great country. I didn't have anything handed to me. I worked hard, grew up quickly, and took on big responsibilities. But what shaped me most was listening to the hard -working South Carolinians who'd come by our family business, sharing their hopes and struggles, or hearing the perspectives of my brave colleagues in the military. Whether I agreed with them or not, those conversations built my understanding of what Americans need and deserve. Now, Fellow American, we all know our nation's in a tough spot -- we're divided, but there are some things we should agree on, plain and simple. 🇺🇸 We need a country where you can raise your family without fear, where the streets are safe. 🇺🇸 We need a country where the American Dream isn't just a slogan. It's alive, and every hard -working American has a real shot at it, no matter where they start. Sadly, there are folks in Washington, across the aisle, who don't see it that way. They're fine with open borders, allowing violent crime spill into our neighborhoods. They're okay with slapping higher taxes on hard-working folks like you, piling more burdens on your family. That isn't right, and I won't stand for it. So I'm coming to you with a simple ask, Fellow American. If you've got a few dollars to spare, | Fellow American, I know we can build a country that keeps our communities safe, rewards hard work, and gives every American a chance to chase their dreams -- just like I did. Thank you for taking a minute to hear my story. I'm grateful for you. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham - In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

body:
#

Hey Peter, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: **[Can you rush $5 to my re-election campaign today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250803-1-f&t=1&akid=607%2E5691347%2E0WD5un)
Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.
And I am the _only_ Democratic U.S. Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won.
That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me.
**_There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.**_
So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, **for all of us.**
**[If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250803-1-f&t=2&akid=607%2E5691347%2E0WD5un)
The campaign will be brutal.
_But this team wins the hardest battles._
We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible.
Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority.
And we will win again — with your help.
**[Please: send $5 to my re-election campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250803-1-f&t=3&akid=607%2E5691347%2E0WD5un)
With gratitude,
Senator Jon Ossoff
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250803-1-f&t=4&akid=607%2E5691347%2E0WD5un)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=607%2E5691347%2E0WD5un) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=607%2E5691347%2E0WD5un) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Democrats.org
subject: Help us meet this moment, Derek:
body:
Democrats’ plan to take back our Senate majority is happening now.
---
Derek, When it comes to winning back Democrats’ Senate majority, there are two key names you need to know: **Jon Ossoff.
Roy Cooper.
These are the Democrats running in two of the races _Cook Political Report_ has rated “Toss Up.” There is no path to winning back our Senate majority without winning these seats. But it’s not going to be easy. In **Georgia,** Republicans have already launched a $5 million ad blitz against Democrat Jon Ossoff. In **North Carolina,** Democrat Roy Cooper just entered the race, and Republicans began attacking him less than 60 seconds later. No, we’re not making that up... Trump and his allies know that these two seats could determine Senate control, and they’re laser-focused on winning both of them. We have to be ready to fight back. To do that, we need to lay the foundation for the work ahead — by organizing at every level and investing early and often into our state parties. **But to keep up this work, we need your help.** [Help us meet the moment, Derek. Can you pitch in $3 to help Democrats win back our Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250803_4171_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4171_22930333_v5XlGO&akid=4171%2E22930333%2Ev5XlGO) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250803_4171_fr&refcode2=4171_22930333_v5XlGO&akid=4171%2E22930333%2Ev5XlGO)**

The truth is, all of these Senate races could come down to a handful of votes. We can win these competitive races — but only if we fight for Ossoff and Cooper like they’ll fight for us in the Senate.
With your help today, we will. Thanks for all you’re doing,
The Democrats

**1\. WHO I AM**

My name is Mike Collins.
I was born in Jackson, Georgia. Never left either. It's where I raised my kids, it's where I built my trucking business, and it's where I plan to spend the rest of my years with my wife, Leigh Ann.
I may be a sitting Congressman, but I never thought I'd run for office. That's not something truckers from Jackson think about doing too often.
**But like you, I saw the writing on the wall; When the Biden Regime stole the 2020 election, it was clear****Americans like you and me were going to lose our country, fast.**
****
****
****
**Fast forward two years, and I 'm proud to stand by President Trump, fight for his America First Mandate, and fix the mess the Democrats made of our country:**

****
**> > Passing the Laken Riley Act:****** a bill I authored in honor of Laken Riley -_the young Georgia student who was MURDERED by one of Joe Biden 's illegals_ - making it easier for law enforcement to arrest illegal aliens guilty of committing crimes.
**> > Passing the Big Beautiful Bill:****** cutting taxes, ending the "green" scams harming our farmers, and supercharging ICE deportations with BILLIONS in funding.
**> > Codifying DOGE cuts into federal law****:** exposing the deep state rot in our government and eliminating the waste, fraud, and abuse Americans like YOU are paying for.

****
Democrat Jon Ossoff doesn't care about the border...
He doesn't care about millions of illegals invading our country...
He doesn't care about crime, high taxes, or the fact middle class Americans are being CRUSHED by job killing regulations and power-hungry elites.
**All he cares about is when that next big check will come in from his donors in California and New York, and when he 'll get his 15 minutes of fame for IMPEACHING President Trump.**
****
****
****
That's right, Peter.
_Jon Ossoff 's #1 campaign promise right now is to weaponize another bogus, sham impeachment against our President._

clean_body: Dear Peter , ** My pop always told me to say what I mean and mean what I say. So pardon me for being so blunt with you:**** I need you to rush over $25 right now. I 've officially launched my campaign to defeat Democrat Jon Ossoff in Georgia and fight for President Trump's Agenda in the Senate. .** But before rushing over your donation, Peter, please allow me to tell you: ** 1) Who I am __ 2) Why I 'm running for U.S. Senate; and __ 3) How YOU can help defeat Democrat Jon Ossoff and deliver a MASSIVE WIN for the America First movement There's no time to waste. Let's jump right into it. 1\. WHO I AM My name is Mike Collins. I was born in Jackson, Georgia. Never left either. It's where I raised my kids, it's where I built my trucking business, and it's where I plan to spend the rest of my years with my wife, Leigh Ann. I may be a sitting Congressman, but I never thought I'd run for office. That's not something truckers from Jackson think about doing too often. But like you, I saw the writing on the wall; When the Biden Regime stole the 2020 election, it was clear**Americans like you and me were going to lose our country, fast. ** Fast forward two years, and I 'm proud to stand by President Trump, fight for his America First Mandate, and fix the mess the Democrats made of our country: > Passing the Laken Riley Act:**** a bill I authored in honor of Laken Riley -the young Georgia student who was MURDERED by one of Joe Biden 's illegals - making it easier for law enforcement to arrest illegal aliens guilty of committing crimes. > Passing the Big Beautiful Bill:**** cutting taxes, ending the "green" scams harming our farmers, and supercharging ICE deportations with BILLIONS in funding. > Codifying DOGE cuts into federal law**: exposing the deep state rot in our government and eliminating the waste, fraud, and abuse Americans like YOU are paying for. My Democrat opponent, on the other hand, voted "NO" on all of these things. Which brings me to the next part... 2\. WHY I 'M RUNNING FOR SENATE ** Democrat Jon Ossoff doesn't care about the border... He doesn't care about millions of illegals invading our country... He doesn't care about crime, high taxes, or the fact middle class Americans are being CRUSHED by job killing regulations and power-hungry elites. All he cares about is when that next big check will come in from his donors in California and New York, and when he 'll get his 15 minutes of fame for IMPEACHING President Trump. That's right, Peter. Jon Ossoff 's #1 campaign promise right now is to weaponize another bogus, sham impeachment against our President. That 's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him. President Trump only has a few years left in office and a third impeachment would DERAIL everything we're fighting for. Ain 't no two ways about it - Ossoff must be defeated, and I. Which leads me to part three... 3\. HOW YOU CAN HELP ME DEFEAT **DEMOCRAT JON OSSOFF ** You and I don't need to reinvent the wheel here. To win, we must focus on turning out RECORD REPUBLICAN VOTES in Georgia. Remember: there are no such thing as Senate districts. This race will be won or lost based on who can get the most votes in the state of Georgia. That 's why Democrats like Jon Ossoff pour MILLIONS into cities like Atlanta. It's the easiest way they can get the votes they need without doing any of the travel and legwork. Me on the other hand? I'm a former trucker who's used to driving hours and hours to get the job done and get it done right. And as a Republican, I must travel to all four corners of Georgia to meet with rural voters who will be the real difference makers in this election. This is where YOU come in, Peter. By rushing over $25 today ... You can so I can drive to the most remote and rural parts of Georgia - winning votes in areas most politicians "don't have time" to visit. By rushing over $50 today ... You can - making it known to voters that Republicans are the only party serious about ending the invasion at our border, cracking down on crime, and bringing down the inflation crippling American families. Or, if you 're able to donate $100, $200, all the way up to the FEC max of $3,500... Your one-time generous donation helps me pouring MILLIONS into Jon Ossoff's campaign to buy this election. But regardless of how much you can give, the most critical factor is time. Republicans like you and me cannot wait until election year rolls around to get moving. My team and I are going to battle NOW, and. ? America First, Always, Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate P.S. It's simple; I'm running for Senate to carry out President Trump's agenda and fight for hard-working Americans. My Democrat opponent Jon Ossoff? He's collecting million-dollar checks from California so he can seize power in the Senate, impeach President Trump for a third time, and destroy the America First mandate YOU delivered on election day**. ** P.P.S. I need your help to turn our RECORD VOTES in Georgia and bring home a MAJOR WIN for the America First movement.******? ** PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still readin' this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MAGA TO 70622** If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

Hi Peter, Some days, the attacks on democracy coming out of this White House can feel never-ending. From intimidating media organizations to attempts to undermine the census to the outrageous effort to redraw Texas’s congressional map — the assaults on our democracy are head-spinning. But here’s the thing: The work to save our democracy doesn’t mean exhausting ourselves with every fight Trump picks. It means staying focused on crucial redistricting fights, investing in key state-level elections, and monitoring impactful court decisions. This is the work that — and we’re not exaggerating when we say this — **will help determine whether our democracy emerges from the next four years intact or in tatters. ** [**The NDRC is relentlessly focused on defending our democracy and fair electoral maps across the country. It should be something both parties can agree on: electoral maps should be drawn fairly so that every voter has a voice in our democracy. As Attorney General Eric Holder likes to say, voters should choose their representatives — _not the other way around_.
Just a couple of weeks ago, Trump told reporters that in Texas, he wants a “simple redrawing, we pick up five seats.” Keep in mind that Texas’s maps are already being challenged by voters in court for violating the Voting Rights Act by diluting the voting power of people of color. Texas Republicans just unveiled a map that would do exactly that. They’re eager to do Trump’s bidding, even if it requires cheating — all to stockpile power and advance his extremist agenda.
**Fights like this are exactly why the NDRC exists — to stop politicians from wielding electoral maps as partisan political weapons**. Anti-democracy extremists will always try to wrest power away from voters — it’s on people like us to stop them.
[**The days ahead are absolutely critical — make a contribution TODAY and power our offensive and defensive strategy as we work to defend democracy in Texas and all across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112667906/561227917/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_DefendingDemocracy_email_20250803-NDRC-Tier1-DefendingDemocracy_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250803-NDRC-Tier1-DefendingDemocracy_&utm_campaign=DefendingDemocracy&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1OTk1YjgzLTdhNzAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RZd6e6qff9WEKY2fe1fKZgyW-4XRdqHfv_cvP1j9slc=)
Thanks for being part of this fight!
— Team NDRC

clean_body: The work we do in the next few months will determine whether democracy survives for years and decades to come. | Hi Peter, Some days, the attacks on democracy coming out of this White House can feel never-ending. From intimidating media organizations to attempts to undermine the census to the outrageous effort to redraw Texas’s congressional map — the assaults on our democracy are head-spinning. But here’s the thing: The work to save our democracy doesn’t mean exhausting ourselves with every fight Trump picks. It means staying focused on crucial redistricting fights, investing in key state-level elections, and monitoring impactful court decisions. This is the work that — and we’re not exaggerating when we say this — will help determine whether our democracy emerges from the next four years intact or in tatters. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = It should be something both parties can agree on: electoral maps should be drawn fairly so that every voter has a voice in our democracy. name: Team Pappas
subject: Add your name: Save Medicare and Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Sign the petition now to save Medicare and Medicaid.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1698%2E582294%2EwXKHYQ)
Sixty years ago Medicare and Medicaid transformed health care in America — ensuring that seniors, low-income families, and people with disabilities could get the care they need and deserve.
For six decades these programs have saved lives, reduced poverty, and delivered peace of mind to millions of Americans — including thousands right here in New Hampshire.
**Now Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP are threatening to undo all of that progress.**
The Big Ugly Bill guts Medicaid and threatens Medicare — slashing funding, stripping coverage, and putting lives at risk. It’s cruel, reckless, and wrong.
We can’t let them get away with it. If you agree, sign our petition demanding Republicans keep their hands off Medicare and Medicaid.
[**👉 Add your name to tell the MAGA GOP: _HANDS OFF_ Medicare and Medicaid »**](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/em_ms_cp_20250803_medicare_pt/?source=em20250803-1698&akid=1698%2E582294%2EwXKHYQ)
Chris Pappas is committed to defending these vital programs because every Granite Stater deserves the dignity of affordable, accessible health care.
Help us show that there’s a groundswell of grassroots support behind him.
[**Add your name to the petition today and join Chris in standing up for Medicare, Medicaid, and the millions who count on them.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/em_ms_cp_20250803_medicare_pt/?source=em20250803-1698&akid=1698%2E582294%2EwXKHYQ)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/em_ms_cp_20250803_medicare_pt/?source=em20250803-1698&akid=1698%2E582294%2EwXKHYQ)**
Thanks for being in the fight,
Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250803-1?t=2&refcode2=1698_582294_wXKHYQ&akid=1698%2E582294%2EwXKHYQ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=1698%2E582294%2EwXKHYQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=1698%2E582294%2EwXKHYQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1698%2E582294%2EwXKHYQ)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

Friend, I serve in Congress with three other Muslim Americans: **André Carson (IN-07), Ilhan Omar (MN-05), and Lateefah Simon (CA-12)**. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ41CA8XCwZI4MCkI-GaoNp9QPmQWmYK7sRksc3uSwxt9lv-TyAwRRxHyaXXxhzxnNpvqGIo_4u6BT1TRmkltbLxVRdNlVNsolx4NJ-XRs1s3gI6DP-arD1wPU6T82U1-1HYPrKcxUG-PDnSW0Gs0mzNCrwgJU1o3L8OUgIwtFZ5fbJwS7Nta17kJk8e0Hw3BE5PaGcaoQ440LqSrD5P1Pzfl_cfdbaCerV9M9c8LiJPE76dOKu71NEDWlZ9CeMvkhCiAqp-5OpGiL1QTZUZIJRNenSovw1NW-Ok06waOzj01Ac9DriG-caWkbWjO-O5v7kspYG-bwj4JPKAKjtNCIYiGK4CnIH-tRUnVPTVRaWSfFZBpmtXcOM52gCkMtw3S1/4iq/O49rY6qBTR-m4dHZFkaV5Q/h1/h001.fmlwDS7k2BWsC4KnlpxQgnHp9uGAMem1CXutFi5KHqY) Last month when our colleagues on both sides of the aisle used hateful, Islamophobic, and racist tropes against Zohran Mamdani, we released a joint statement speaking out against these attacks. We know this fearmongering all too well, as Muslim Americans in public office. **We’re reminding our colleagues that Muslims are human beings who deserve to be represented in Congress. Our presence in Congress sends a message to Muslim Americans and other marginalized people that they belong here, in this country and in our government.** Lateefah, André, Ilhan, and I are trying to save lives both at home _and_ abroad. They’ve joined me in calling for the U.S. government to end its complicity in Israel’s forced starvation of Palestinians, and in recognizing 77 years of the ongoing Nakba. **All of us are backing a historic bill to restrict weapons to Israel.** André—whose AIPAC-backed Democratic primary opponent has already launched ads against him—is also leading legislation to restore UNRWA funding. **Unlike the majority of our colleagues, none of us take money from AIPAC.** With your support, we will keep holding the U.S. and Israeli governments accountable for war crimes. We’ll keep demanding our colleagues join us in standing with the majority of Americans who want our government to stop sending weapons to Israel’s military. [**If you agree that our voices belong in Congress, will you chip in today to our joint PAC for Muslim Representatives, The Empowerment Fund?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ41CA8XCwZI4MCkI-GaoNp9QPmQWmYK7sRksc3uSwxt9yle5lSgt2narbG1auBLBEKVldj7MjvWhL4YPoZJFWycl0iwBSCMrmU7jwqoG1st8G2SqPGNiXcSUvC3OcT63suN9PkHldYIAtkXO1shm0Zsf6bGPawaUpfgqctgq2zPCVZdNhrtkyGNxcc4jeV5CIx_ROpRD9KRUbx0BGlNGYUnKMnQJS9nFP-4lViv0140X6mlrUbga7Frs61wmOKQzgVV8yWrZGcpxUh7YK_5kVCPfW3VxsmOPfELaIWImAXNUpzINN4MZxvwxoVupZADhi9nmjgcsDmOus-XqVZTtywBHBvvBnqYxQfWzJzIFEARgAyNSOWo7syLKTUnK8PeGp/4iq/O49rY6qBTR-m4dHZFkaV5Q/h2/h001.RdyPnVXhc0E5PjKFk1JLgJYDjm2UdeUtFoP8faWMI5c) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly toThe Empowerment Fund_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ41CA8XCwZI4MCkI-GaoNp20ht_J6mEDm3s5-5eNux6JQ_GNTxxFUjwumlu6MlsFUL1moeav8M5GgGigmuP2VIQGXYIZh1Ngs3CnFkT4ZeJALHLI-M13eg1xWCB9_qmUjbf6oQy3IXb5f3qBEuEZ-jHDuvt__TnGame2WWlYP5ScATJUnbhWOfRITIsL_1wtC9tc2d6zqw_VhNfcZ0sWBF2OeQK90pqqIY2OQvw4fBVF2m9NaogJqFpTRhYgSCD8FGhaONmfTMNrBnwd-cPsGsGPsOfvsHSIt7RA_cn6DkBMY0vhs4iV9xD3-foGesFa0Yts1irpzHwVTUf2hzY8Bl3jaXeRomaC9h7-s5WlWXxYStMfT_jMw5mhn3YrIPMZXm1y1wUiXhbLX0tpFr_99PHnFBcX4p6voRTvVIUk_LnU/4iq/O49rY6qBTR-m4dHZFkaV5Q/h3/h001.Di6eeewsgk2PtQY9qNTG8JpYl0SOl8wXOhsqDag9DrY)

Thank you for having our backs. With your support, we will continue resisting the growing dehumanization and violence against Muslim Americans, immigrants, people of color, Palestinians, and other marginalized communities.
André Carson and I have both led policies to uplift and honor Muslim Americans, and each year we all hold Congressional Iftar dinners to celebrate Ramadan at the Capitol with our colleagues.
**We represent a community that’s often unseen, which motivates us to lift up the voices of all people who’ve felt unseen by our government.**
Even as we face death threats and anti-Muslim attacks, we will not stop fighting back against Trump’s attacks on our constituents and against Republicans’ cuts to lifesaving programs. For example, we’re leading the fight against Trump’s racist African and Muslim ban.
We will keep pushing our colleagues in Congress to move with the majority of their constituents and invest in their communities’ needs rather than sending U.S. bombs to massacre Palestinian children.
[**Please stand with us today and donate to our joint PAC, The Empowerment Fund. Any donation you can make will help me, André Carson, Ilhan Omar, and Lateefah Simon stay in Congress fighting for you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ41CA8XCwZI4MCkI-GaoNp9QPmQWmYK7sRksc3uSwxt-uOKr_7es99d7SDFzsU4AoR79tiRo2Fbdml5pC7O6RUfVipevHmwaJHdgl16vv8QHfxKib19lmpjB0ZbmbYrQxTK1nVq3AZn__ERniKNbv5TuncGT2zydX0Qz0AWerbPa_-xgZpCh79ACCXQP_YkIQ_BPE-EoDMUQpm5w6q0szYKuyq32QRgZOKrGX9qTA1DF1nZF7jlHBCvqKEC_OZHy-w-rTWzRY3YD1d-SUg7-83S8C3CGgysC6iVymbkDNFsBNbJV3TGkqA5XRRb4U4WO6jXnXe_qTIILKevEqQ4ZJ_IOK7MGeuipm-0RsDUZQYDJLEeu6UBDGxUOgWvPehbVa/4iq/O49rY6qBTR-m4dHZFkaV5Q/h9/h001.7-OuRhj_PoDT_yuqqVaawazmOHjCNJplISW1No9yaBI)

Thank you so much for having our backs. Everywhere I go, I see people protesting against ICE and calling for a free Palestine. People of all backgrounds are with us, and it’s time to make sure our government actually represents the American people.
Together we will keep building toward equity, dignity, and safety for all.
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Aug 2, 2025
Subject: I’m one of four Muslim Representatives in Congress
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
I’m one of four Muslim people now serving in Congress.
We see people of all faiths and ethnicities as human beings who deserve dignity and safety. But many of our colleagues have normalized anti-Muslim hate, calling us terrorists and endangering our lives just because of our faith.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ41CA8XCwZI4MCkI-GaoNp9QPmQWmYK7sRksc3uSwxt-rEe5Ye0p61lcR5_ElINaUwLi5zuY_Bo6REwDgWHjhIDKOrIcHz9e1VayeHg2tkdpGAyYDrwWy6xXL7DD4KVuu5UgLZi5DGPJ8YmQ1tj9tzTgXSplFo5kJYeMPoYxqqKuocaJe16u5QQc3vv1upxhKbWIGWZh5IQjQhRQA13afLbLB7sKMDqv4_z8C2Z9uzLCNtcQWzAyzbZHV1-1rYB4syLdLbXBwn2IRVYYVBOjlgLbrb4IVdDc4fvQWOH1WCkRYpAb1As5AFvusCmGc4-jQKvSlPx_OKycX6HRrAuvNnGYKV2EIHOomY5fCXuuzXPACbmwlI3KxmyPvme3F49-u/4iq/O49rY6qBTR-m4dHZFkaV5Q/h11/h001.g_9OeVVxJxl_tSsIGhXErScQNEg-SnWiaJbcDiS_1pU)
_(from left to right, photo shows André Carson, Ilhan Omar, Lateefah Simon, and me)_
Together we’re demanding an end to the growing dehumanization and violence against vulnerable communities, including immigrants, Muslim Americans, and Palestinians.
**We’re pushing our colleagues to listen to the majority of Americans and stop enabling this genocide of the Palestinian people.**
Unlike most of our colleagues in Congress, we don’t take money from AIPAC. Our stances make us targets of pro-genocide groups and their far-right billionaire donors. For example, André Carson has an electoral opponent who brags about being backed by AIPAC.
[**If you agree that our voices belong in Congress, will you chip in today to support the re-election campaigns of Muslim Representatives Ilhan Omar (MN-05), André Carson (IN-07), Lateefah Simon (CA-12), and me?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ41CA8XCwZI4MCkI-GaoNp9QPmQWmYK7sRksc3uSwxt8DuqHzUor821HKYcsezJ6namJgjO0_KIl1_Bnc4JSpBga_HF7o1XIVClGqWaGY6as9wKjEhSOlpNb_gZz5IT3PuJrWIaPGir9d9hHkUAk7B5DtrXS4eU9jKMWmO8UOC-ng19EItzaZz1s10eik_VMip7Id8NIWXzHoheoG1_gVzCUDMm3HkOrtp-3EXC9VQ-uUUxFSBsZmkp3KhR4q31tGey4NKwoKfMv1PZfoa8IDrqwkya6O60jUypq0ZB4swgNLNWyJ8Oyg9vpQ8AuU42mgBaGxqlv4tQ9SCzp5G0bi2dqivSk3bPBJdGZIuWnskET3sa99ExSuXU0Z9wkPUod4/4iq/O49rY6qBTR-m4dHZFkaV5Q/h12/h001.ZrqkImGcFJCLa6yCAMrVsDaHp8UGTdK8EgZlXrsnBjg)

Last month, Zohran Mamdani won the Democratic primary for New York City mayor, with more votes than any prior NYC mayoral primary election. His positions align with our voting base, including fighting for human rights and for everyone to have what they need to thrive.
But our colleagues on both sides of the aisle attacked him. Ilhan, Lateefah, André, and I released a shared statement to call out the vile, anti-Muslim, and racist smears against him.
At least 50% of Muslim Americans have experienced religious discrimination, which André Carson recognized in his congressional resolution to honor Muslim Americans.
**As Muslim Americans in public office, we get death threats daily—but that will never silence us.**
**We’re standing with the American people, the majority of whom now want us to end the genocide in Gaza. Seven out of ten democrats want an arms embargo. The majority of Americans have an unfavorable view of the government of Israel, including many Jewish neighbors. Congress can't keep ignoring the fact that our country is done funding a genocide. It is harder now than ever to ignore it.**
Lateefah, André, Ilhan, and I are listening and demanding an end to U.S. complicity in Israel’s war crimes. We all support policies to block weapons to Israel’s military and to commemorate the ongoing Nakba. André is leading legislation to restore funding to UNRWA and get aid into Gaza. Ilhan, who survived war as a child, is leading the push for a foreign policy that centers diplomacy rather than militarism and offered multiple amendments to stop the funding of the genocide.
**We’re pushing to save lives at home and abroad,** so we’re also championing policies to defend our immigrant neighbors, expand our civil rights, guarantee access to healthcare and other lifesaving needs, and make life more affordable for working class people.
[**We will keep calling on our colleagues in Congress to listen to the majority of Americans and stop enabling war crimes against Palestinians. clean_body: Many of our colleagues have normalized anti-Muslim hate, and we’re pushing back against this dehumanization. | | | Friend, I serve in Congress with three other Muslim Americans: André Carson (IN-07), Ilhan Omar (MN-05), and Lateefah Simon (CA-12). Last month when our colleagues on both sides of the aisle used hateful, Islamophobic, and racist tropes against Zohran Mamdani, we released a joint statement speaking out against these attacks. We know this fearmongering all too well, as Muslim Americans in public office. We’re reminding our colleagues that Muslims are human beings who deserve to be represented in Congress. Our presence in Congress sends a message to Muslim Americans and other marginalized people that they belong here, in this country and in our government. Lateefah, André, Ilhan, and I are trying to save lives both at home and abroad. They’ve joined me in calling for the U.S. government to end its complicity in Israel’s forced starvation of Palestinians, and in recognizing 77 years of the ongoing Nakba. All of us are backing a historic bill to restrict weapons to Israel. André—whose AIPAC-backed Democratic primary opponent has already launched ads against him—is also leading legislation to restore UNRWA funding. Unlike the majority of our colleagues, none of us take money from AIPAC. With your support, we will keep holding the U.S. and Israeli governments accountable for war crimes. We’ll keep demanding our colleagues join us in standing with the majority of Americans who want our government to stop sending weapons to Israel’s military. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly toThe Empowerment Fund | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for having our backs. With your support, we will continue resisting the growing dehumanization and violence against Muslim Americans, immigrants, people of color, Palestinians, and other marginalized communities. André Carson and I have both led policies to uplift and honor Muslim Americans, and each year we all hold Congressional Iftar dinners to celebrate Ramadan at the Capitol with our colleagues. We represent a community that’s often unseen, which motivates us to lift up the voices of all people who’ve felt unseen by our government. Even as we face death threats and anti-Muslim attacks, we will not stop fighting back against Trump’s attacks on our constituents and against Republicans’ cuts to lifesaving programs. For example, we’re leading the fight against Trump’s racist African and Muslim ban. We will keep pushing our colleagues in Congress to move with the majority of their constituents and invest in their communities’ needs rather than sending U.S. bombs to massacre Palestinian children. Thank you so much for having our backs. Everywhere I go, I see people protesting against ICE and calling for a free Palestine. People of all backgrounds are with us, and it’s time to make sure our government actually represents the American people. Together we will keep building toward equity, dignity, and safety for all. [**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=573d9d9fc9794d17a92d9b704c827492&_e=K26QztNs7dsfl5q2lECPQjeWGajcioFWYjwGaV_C8sUgcFkjh242FGaD1bYWOZTVM_eqee0vB9UiuKKnR7aTok2Tc1DpDgCdQXsJCHJ66zVAT35X_sXP7ie-EvCG7K_YxXSQUKDkEUrBNNF-FlbWm_96jpoESMt47JbZ7vM4k8XasgGbCaROuqIPk3UOOcjCzc3vQ47RV-hYHevvsKT0zfS08h2GFFw2Momg2uCXi-FgdiTzd52Gk2CYtFOIpA5qKorlykMd8sCZO7YIIA_SRKk1xoNlSf-EH81BNEwF3GWsNJl7qT0KZdvyDfK-1vClfv3UKNZtV3KMsVQTV4kGtRmBYSm_AbzMoYrAvwmcBcXbA-PfKIuKrONNK4kKvSgOkmM7VwqTYtwin5ziWa1x0ZpeHVWLB4Bk7MaHMh6blq4089kqrdS3IJtL_h7-jsyS_Y2nog2Cn3eNhn4EAWuZKS-u85EI1sUGAkneyUXsfy0OB_iEgEqBxyXrPkIsUlwVPyNIxu5_k78Kh3wZmjBdyC6GyijAz0YGCRe6OWedcdBSXOjbFr4VZXgEegufu3Xh1ui9E61URZVZLrM7h8W3SMW1mujFjlgU5_j-6r5YSaB5weDZxSzoPYJHN6C2aGmgPVOgywcggVBpGs95X9yz_1naoJ0O1OgigV3n9u-_psxA86ioUB9_0K7ipo8dsG3XIB9mvgyoEK_rAZEtss5PMqZRvhy3b4UXVI5hDI-tUyY%3D)
Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: This confidential RNC data made my jaw drop. Did I read this right?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206qbts6digse03fvfdl51peuty3jf557dooq9orgv4fqkw1ag9wplmvh1f2stxjg4r8erqhji2d4uexf9t&__stmp=t0fcev&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0fcev&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1tmcp9tusakueo8wgzakfncv8t2ydfaevoai56z8lrb462hvrrky9kvn829gw88his5i7d9aa8knvl3bm43ldfcvzuxyhaz3qcav423qqyynsmhp5gnu4bb164uixsy7jae5ejv71l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0fcev&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0fcev&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0fcev&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0fcev&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1tmcp9tusakueo8wgzakfncv8t2ydfaevoai56z8lrb462hvrrky9kvn829gw88his5i7d9aa8knvl3bm43ldfcvzuxyhaz3qcav423qqyynsmhp5gnu4bb164uixsy7jae5ejv71l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0fcev&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0fcev&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: some bad news, some good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
The Senate map this cycle is brutal, and Democrats have no path to retaking the Senate majority in 2026 without defending seats like Colorado’s.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93101?refcode=em20250803-9207&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9207%2E614464%2E-3krI4)
I have to share some bad news with you: **the Senate map this cycle is brutal, and Democrats have no path to retaking the Senate majority in 2026 without defending seats like Colorado’s.**
Just let that sink in for a moment, folks.
**If we lose this seat, there goes our best chance of rebuilding our Democratic Senate majority to halt Trump and Republicans’ extreme agenda and continue making progress for working people** — like expanding access to health care, keeping jobs here in America, tackling the sky-high cost of living, _and more._
Now here’s the good news. **I’ve got one heck of a card up my sleeve: an incredible grassroots team.**
Look, National Republicans have been eyeing this seat ever since we won in 2020 and flipped Colorado blue. But this seat has a history of flipping back and forth, so we can’t afford to get complacent and let the GOP tighten its grip on Congress.
**Peter, that means it’s going to take all of us working together to keep this seat blue and help Democrats take back the Senate in 2026.[If you’re up for that fight, please, take a moment to split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots and help us prepare for the long road ahead. →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93101?refcode=em20250803-9207&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9207%2E614464%2E-3krI4)**

subject: URGENT: Special August Meeting with Congressman Louie Gohmert!

Please open this important message about our August meeting of the Arapahoe Tea Party...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hj06BKV1VVbPoE3dTx6XfAhuogwrPKB6Ky_p0wv4X0oiQq02R-M9R3dj8nNXQJL1gJ1yny6_nuvUvaKP213ADuHm2UdU0BZeDnuE5RxVYQ4ULNgaIEwbgbn3SHYuYbWRZsdTAoeHguEpvRpC8PAx0ogiq4TdCf6pcl5sG6CgVQ0=&c=yIv11elzMD18g-XBivx0GiyF8rHQBCgtzMvdWTrMNI2jZnm_EJ4HKQ==&ch=YeiNkd2leEwUQAYNVI2i6X7FYSG8kbKW68zYHyw-nZ1jI73-G-abfg==)
---
Hey Everyone!
We are thrilled here at Arapahoe Tea Party to announce a special meeting, on a special date and time, with Former Congressman Louie Gohmert of Texas!
Congressman Gohmert is making a special trip to Colorado to meet you all and help invigorate our membership to stay in the fight through 2026.
Thanks to our friends at [Team Imer PAC](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hj06BKV1VVbPoE3dTx6XfAhuogwrPKB6Ky_p0wv4X0oiQq02R-M9R5ET88ziCEDXrE0W78iHRnLdM87-wX9EEQFBfNz2fW6BHzOJAAy-CGq8TsehVQI7BNeuhtpIhAYvdVryiW1Rk_TP9ladAnwKBI4nsjE-WKO3&c=yIv11elzMD18g-XBivx0GiyF8rHQBCgtzMvdWTrMNI2jZnm_EJ4HKQ==&ch=YeiNkd2leEwUQAYNVI2i6X7FYSG8kbKW68zYHyw-nZ1jI73-G-abfg==), we can have this event with Congressman Gohmert.
While Team Imer is contributing significantly to the Congressman's travel costs and security for this event, we need to contribute to that cost.
Tickets start at just $20, $30 for couples, and you can purchase 10 tickets for $175.
We apologize for not being able to make this event free to our membership, but we hope you understand the reasoning behind it.
If you are unable to afford a ticket, please contact me below, and I will do my best to accommodate you.
As always, click the image or button below to RSVP for our meeting.
---

| | [RSVP Here](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hj06BKV1VVbPoE3dTx6XfAhuogwrPKB6Ky_p0wv4X0oiQq02R-M9R5Ojj5b5FVkt3_mYX-ztHvJ3q7DFFX9tO3112360jbFlvzmIzLCimgDUM_u_F5_HmV4bKZBJK5CDsWi1ee1zBURGlMjaNn4V47oqPvq5JQn21N5cFRhs_fEygcKsupn4RuaptGiVGheaChnYe-FsDFmSKA0LuMJnZwK5NXI8rHeWTL_pKTCCssBi3eQg00gWD-NfKFZ6qLbm&c=yIv11elzMD18g-XBivx0GiyF8rHQBCgtzMvdWTrMNI2jZnm_EJ4HKQ==&ch=YeiNkd2leEwUQAYNVI2i6X7FYSG8kbKW68zYHyw-nZ1jI73-G-abfg==)
