name: Stop the Oligarchs via Our Revolution
subject: Break the Billionaire Bubble – Fuel Our Revolution’s ‘Anti-Oligarch Summer’
disclaimer_text:
paid for by
slashing health care and nutrition assistance for millions
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1011&refcode=email-20250803_v&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Billionaires and oligarchs rejoiced as Trump and his MAGA Republicans
rammed through massive tax giveaways for the ultra-wealthy – paid for by
slashing health care and nutrition assistance for millions.

Now, as families struggle to put food on the table and cover skyrocketing
health care costs, America’s 1% are planning to spend their August sipping
cocktails behind gated mansions, untouched by the crises they helped
create.

They think their pristine lawns and private beaches can shield them from
what’s unfolding beyond their gates. But right now, Our Revolution is
mobilizing to burst the billionaire bubble by showing up to protest at
their doorsteps — in the Hamptons and beyond. And we need your support,
right now, to make it happen.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250803nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Will you chip in $5, $27, or whatever you can to send our anti-oligarch
summer protests right to the doors of America’s wealthiest robber barons?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250803nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250803nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250803nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250803nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250803nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250803nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

In the last few years, America’s billionaires have nearly doubled their
wealth – even as child poverty doubled and life expectancy dropped.

As billionaires’ wealth skyrocketed, so has their political influence. And
now we’re trapped in a system where politicians party with billionaires,
vote for corporate tax cuts, and then disappear to luxury resorts and
gated estates while communities fall apart.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?source=email-20250803&t=1060&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Bernie tweet about the fact that Oligarchy is not an abstract concept.

But here’s the thing, Peter Willis. It doesn’t have to
be this way. And so Our Revolution is fighting back.

Trump and the GOP want us divided and distracted. But the truth is, every
time we organize in the streets, we build power. And so we are launching a
series of actions in the coming weeks in places like the Hamptons to show
Congress and their billionaire donors the consequences of their cruelty by
organizing so loudly and massively they can't drown us out with their
money.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250803nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]This people-powered effort can only happen because grassroots supporters
like you make it possible. WIll you chip in today to fuel our
anti-oligarch summer and help us show the super-rich that real power will
always belong to the people?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1007&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1008&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22266?t=1010&akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9114%2E5885482%2EzL0hLb

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a

Donald Trump promised to safeguard Social Security and Medicare for Americans.

**But in July, his MAGA allies in Congress voted “yes” to the largest Medicaid cut in history** – turning their backs on the more than 70 million Americans who rely on these critical public services.

**Now, they’re putting Social Security on the chopping block next.** Due to cuts made by the Trump administration, the program may run out of funds as early as 2033!

New Dems are fighting tooth-and-nail to defend Social Security in Congress, but we can’t win this fight alone.

**[Could you please add your name now to stand with New Dems to demand Congress protect Social security? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112670931/561236223/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250803_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTU0ZThlOC04MjcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ybrjnLBmgwGIaFKQ9aTvAuI-FK5BZqA69D-sesmu_8=&emci=cbf59316-026f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7e54e8e8-8270-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**
[YES, I STAND WITH NEW DEMS TO PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112670935/561236225/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250803_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTU0ZThlOC04MjcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ybrjnLBmgwGIaFKQ9aTvAuI-FK5BZqA69D-sesmu_8=&emci=cbf59316-026f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7e54e8e8-8270-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)

Thank you!
_New Dems_

www.newdemactionfund.com

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

clean_body: | | | **** The Daily Signal writes, “All eyes are turning to Virginia as the state heads into its off-year elections for governor and control of the Virginia House of Delegates this November.” In our race to expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and deliver Trump a big defeat in Washington, DC’s backyard, our army of people keeps growing. Hundreds of dedicated volunteers. Thousands of grassroots donors. One goal: flip VA-HD22. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Jay Jones
subject: Virginia is the last state in the South that protects abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Here's the reality, team:
Virginia is the last state in the South that protects abortion rights, and the next Attorney General will play a huge role in deciding the fate of abortion rights and reproductive healthcare.
As Attorney General, I will fight with the entire power of the office to defend this right from Trump’s overreach. But I need your help to win this race first. Can I ask you to contribute $15 to my campaign right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=15]
DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=15]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
We have a major choice before us, Virginia: we can vote for a future where we have an Attorney General committed to protecting the right to abortion, or a future where reproductive freedom is at risk in the Commonwealth.
Here’s why...
Donald Trump is actively working to restrict abortion rights in America. He’s even considering a nationwide ban. If Trump tries to ban abortion, Virginia needs an Attorney General who will sue to protect our rights.
But our current Attorney General, Jason Miyares, is an anti-abortion extremist and proud Trump ally who will support whatever Trump tries to do.
Top Virginia pundits are calling this "the most important Attorney General race in a generation." That’s because issues like this are at stake.
As your next Attorney General, I will do everything in my power to protect reproductive rights for all Virginians. Please, will you join my fight and make a contribution of $15 or more right now? Your help will be critical in winning this race in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=15]

Fellow Conservative,

**I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot.**

**Will you[chip in just $1](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=476cd1048aef47c8a95fc91bd6ad5299&_e=VIorTiNn43a5OJeDoyYzkft7ddKiTPTt2Xxkx_qZC6hUtQnkj_TGlQuW7Pg-XMC7O0kfaLQzm3ETEf_IjSrtJ2Nml2PdX2Bhr7Trl3iXWMg_9_7P9GWBSMlWVDV2D6cCM1PwConLOd-UCPrLQqqQ7idlgOr06sx8mkxCiStL1uTrge3bgjagPWgRGURDKpECI91Xp7vz1cL45UwnQqp9xt8uXfm-JKEHfYpMI5W09QnbAImCeYHaxdNnFLv7Ng6hF2qj2K_kcHN-U_xdeWWnJ4gyQZKEH8LU2PRTJRZzdfskDBwQW_VAZqGHxBnIQJ5BO4qxXAV8krC_g01e7zsoOlUwNLdhni1lCZLgCltVOmhZsFHrEBUtpaJWUsMCRODT_SMbnRBPeZ-hpppVBegy04B75Qt_Chc_khz8M9Jrt42WsOpWhIGJjP22lpCPs8N74b-5RbYWGhwq_03nwnZihpGsFxs_DXcMbW8i4HX2ll0714hf2k7aPL6pjxCT0l_jl35wMjYmAc8cpWZFZIy7Qw__l23trjQBis2iCWsZeIfSsFFjg3QxZCAHFEaLmi6hVupz_APWjjgfDloetfW0aB4bQaTbpgGDsGcJz3kzTVD49Sirpxf-VrFdaZfMVdhHOtWpdVnNcZx6pWwSrUqFc9UgUElrddEIDRXBpOCbEUWIwvPuIMsTnRFJPhDf64Oaz3DuSHyuprOnqMqm1t0walXlh3aotVZCHVTSLKIhqF101ygSqTTZRiXjNdtV9F7MyolYGRwwbnY795Tqj6DcNHvbPqJjxtsMbI_qaDEwu_7MMqZlHtV8IKR1ItIK3ODn1uTinpgI1icvVzrWEjxan_5Hh7to-BoeYq_mvbYkkv7klrdvmxhNuH7qIy2N5Sewo-8MurtGze5ZUeI1BaqNNw%3D%3D) today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate?
**
You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — **[I’m asking you to come off the sidelines for just one dollar.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=476cd1048aef47c8a95fc91bd6ad5299&_e=VIorTiNn43a5OJeDoyYzkft7ddKiTPTt2Xxkx_qZC6hUtQnkj_TGlQuW7Pg-XMC7O0kfaLQzm3ETEf_IjSrtJ2Nml2PdX2Bhr7Trl3iXWMg_9_7P9GWBSMlWVDV2D6cCM1PwConLOd-UCPrLQqqQ7idlgOr06sx8mkxCiStL1uTrge3bgjagPWgRGURDKpECI91Xp7vz1cL45UwnQqp9xt8uXfm-JKEHfYpMI5W09QnbAImCeYHaxdNnFLv7Ng6hF2qj2K_kcHN-U_xdeWWnJ4gyQZKEH8LU2PRTJRZzdfskDBwQW_VAZqGHxBnIQJ5BO4qxXAV8krC_g01e7zsoOlUwNLdhni1lCZLgCltVOmg73rF04P0rVH8xaaC3y772YCizFvAO4n3KXx3rQrvKLTs2PTM1uAdVSNn8vnOmfDnx2Ro8f20A14Co3GS83h4eIGZpVHwnW3M6WNNEMSJTIgp62AXK3Pfr6jUz6u5E9k6sWid19bdl_PIDbJa_vhFfJhPB-kIIeaHhO_D6f_mJk1ZzZUqWsC7WVLDMBc6md_5v0HvCRptmrT-0CH5ybMzT8DEQ0e7yNSlUo3jabERfgk33Mhc_-PUlOE_xxWv-GoYhD_oImdfXg96kwPoInpA34MdJlSmCALgTfTbk-l1OZA5S40rTZe0o4UrHx1_EzQKoj4Psppc3bjCF7uee3W_L8A75SG4C_gSuFoKhIFBzApmzZ6jFpzxqg5df9YJrav7RnsJvZ49_bqquYckn7lhn9h9dFtuByGE0Be1t6g4j5N9ciUFtMnDL_A7ryz9qhazTO5qHWfqFQZpstw0eFWhcf2gYMjLtmvCNy4-2aULmtPt1Kblm7ssogp1qWUfWKOy91EywYxitfeK2l2n9WqLO9jH4pySfTxveZhUE5aNUsA%3D%3D) **

Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

Because **it locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

[**CHIP IN $1 NOW**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=476cd1048aef47c8a95fc91bd6ad5299&_e=VIorTiNn43a5OJeDoyYzkft7ddKiTPTt2Xxkx_qZC6hUtQnkj_TGlQuW7Pg-XMC7O0kfaLQzm3ETEf_IjSrtJ2Nml2PdX2Bhr7Trl3iXWMg_9_7P9GWBSMlWVDV2D6cCM1PwConLOd-UCPrLQqqQ7idlgOr06sx8mkxCiStL1uTrge3bgjagPWgRGURDKpECI91Xp7vz1cL45UwnQqp9xt8uXfm-JKEHfYpMI5W09QnbAImCeYHaxdNnFLv7Ng6hF2qj2K_kcHN-U_xdeWWnJ4gyQZKEH8LU2PRTJRZzdfskDBwQW_VAZqGHxBnIQJ5BO4qxXAV8krC_g01e7zsoOlUwNLdhni1lCZLgCltVOmhTb2nxeQ8sHGouTH8raRhXS4d7n3fQxz8ilzRF-JWRCXC4dtVNMYamZ41sREm4M7rfydlyQqKMoFccYj5BdIwMQMwXcr3IiA0I97MQV35Keg9n_mw7zXxoS_KPZAPNVxZwHvqFBfM7rnq6EQUu4bwhcf_SB7H9jJFb9WyzkPik9tFw8BMuXFOvtnilBVszMMuFUDHr3GszJI6zGqXjvf2kcleDwCrFz10dYFrYutySXx0AiK4obMFXl7AD2PjkNwcGKsrj8wZeHS723lxXK2_7qbdqwBiDYVFDuwd2YimaiW3yZEXuD9msJ5tM75ZgoCFULczoQYyqfnHDm2bAh0qMd7UQopna6Sb85PQhI_ecg0Y9pAB_53Y3uReOw1lE8tMsQWhdLmQSZV9WoDQ9vwSr_leNqkLt9RaiDiHCWlzYtNHMEtMvz8pWr8I5pIC0T3rzTgdMzfJm4191REPx7jEF2hu7M42wiQeAVOzXGU8XOpqdtwqCsaN5TnKfiC4pxAOAS4A81_MuU4grwUKxKyt5G5B_dI0MHAgOqiTcXkmVCQ%3D%3D)

Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you.

When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: **we’re still in this fight.
**
You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — **[even if it’s just for $1.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=476cd1048aef47c8a95fc91bd6ad5299&_e=VIorTiNn43a5OJeDoyYzkft7ddKiTPTt2Xxkx_qZC6hUtQnkj_TGlQuW7Pg-XMC7O0kfaLQzm3ETEf_IjSrtJ2Nml2PdX2Bhr7Trl3iXWMg_9_7P9GWBSMlWVDV2D6cCM1PwConLOd-UCPrLQqqQ7idlgOr06sx8mkxCiStL1uTrge3bgjagPWgRGURDKpECI91Xp7vz1cL45UwnQqp9xt8uXfm-JKEHfYpMI5W09QnbAImCeYHaxdNnFLv7Ng6hF2qj2K_kcHN-U_xdeWWnJ4gyQZKEH8LU2PRTJRZzdfskDBwQW_VAZqGHxBnIQJ5BO4qxXAV8krC_g01e7zsoOlUwNLdhni1lCZLgCltVOmjIkpJxgg-PomT7VVJDmuF2DQh8zj6DTml2YChHQTmyGT-s7GWHj-2i0-lXl2IqN-mAgAXydsRv9lO-FluvygV1UsTqdkU3Y3Z-rO_JNs0f2ZVqiDEMZWGh9-g5er-eJGzdWWd7YUXs8UXZSNhF70xcAJyVPXcnKymguFXckZR64aQfuA3Jb1Bn5Fz3GWLbLtrPwsMMRQ3gaNxlcct372wPkPBGg7887PBKcTJT_m3lyT1zEuYQr2qXCJ7DXSxNLuhIPBJ-YCM4GnFkfEgIZHFOCVr3Pq3VYPspjjvDaTPkaS1xLdso2T9G02Lt4XDtVoDPgl9gemnB8NFSWcj9iqpBp0Ga3m1HabwIGpcbRDCtIsPsosQg1A07ht83B7fH6hee4DyYi6_imk6Tyo4pAlBB_74TD1dC9JYKF_ELzUNPmjnLLOlGVhN0ve4PdW8PL4QZjNXpqjztt3Z8zisVmIV80txOvkRMYLjHWUdQa2cgYrRVAn_9L-WzWvD5s4hh5L_W5EHnmU8XKvHd5yUQHNIfJ63wZacaTytTDuaugMtHlQ%3D%3D) **

When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: we’re still in this fight. You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — For America, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator - Texas | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

name: David Hogg
subject: This is a moment of crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We have to ask ourselves this question...
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250803-1&t=1&akid=2468%2E587540%2Ehag2vT)
Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg.
We have to ask ourselves: How do we build a Democratic Party that the working class wants to vote for?
Because right now, we’re facing a _real_ problem.
Millions of people are leaving blue states and moving to the South, where their votes are gerrymandered and suppressed out of power.
We say we want to win back the working class. We say we want dramatic change.
But then we turn around and expect to do all that _without changing who’s in power._
That’s not going to work.
**The cast of characters that brought us here are not who’s going to get us out of here.**
If we’re serious about saving our democracy, if we’re serious about becoming the party of the people, not just the lesser evil — then we need to start acting like it.
That’s why Leaders We Deserve is building a healthy, people-powered culture of primaries.
**We believe that being in office for 30 years shouldn’t mean you get to coast through the next 10 without a challenge, especially not in the middle of a crisis.**
We are a democracy. We are the Democratic Party. We need to have a healthy culture of ensuring that people, including incumbents, can be challenged in primaries — and it’s not looked down on. It is embraced and celebrated.
We’re not doing this to be divisive. We’re doing this because our party has to dramatically change if it wants to survive and win elections again.
We need to tangibly show voters why we are not the least bad of two options, but why we are the best option. Period.
And that’s not going to happen with the same insiders spouting the same empty talking points year after year.
We need a new generation of leaders — with new ideas, new energy, and the courage to tell voters the truth and actually earn their trust. And yeah, that might make some folks in power uncomfortable.
But guess what? _That’s the point._
**Comfortable people — especially comfortable people with power — do not change. And right now, it is time for a change in management.**
This is a moment of crisis. We cannot keep tiptoeing around the truth.
Our democracy is being dismantled in broad daylight. And if we don’t meet this moment with urgency, courage, and new leadership — we will lose.
We have to change this culture and truly embrace democracy within our party if we are going to find our way out of this. Because no single person has the answer — but I can assure you, a healthy culture of competition is something our party can only stand to benefit from.
**At Leaders We Deserve, we’re not afraid to shake things up. We’re building the bench. We’re challenging the status quo. And we’re backing the kind of young, bold, progressive candidates who have the guts to do what this moment demands.**
But we need your support to do this work. We can only keep changing the game with folks like you stepping up to power our grassroots movement.
**[Peter, contribute $5 or anything you can right now to back us in this fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250803_1_primaries?refcode=em20250803-2468&amount=5&refcode2=2468_587540_hag2vT&akid=2468%2E587540%2Ehag2vT)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250803_1_primaries?amount=5&refcode=em20250803-2468&refcode2=2468_587540_hag2vT&akid=2468%2E587540%2Ehag2vT)**
With urgency and gratitude,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250803-1&t=2&refcode2=2468_587540_hag2vT&akid=2468%2E587540%2Ehag2vT)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2468%2E587540%2Ehag2vT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2468%2E587540%2Ehag2vT)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

subject: CA-GOV fundraising summary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39965%2E3422442%2EoweEeZ)
Dear Peter,
All the California Governor candidates’ fundraising reports have now been made public.
**[We’re going to break down the key takeaways for you, but first, will you chip in $5 to help us maintain our fundraising momentum?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250803_1_ak?refcode=em20250803-39965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39965_3422442_oweEeZ&akid=39965%2E3422442%2EoweEeZ)**
1. **Katie raised more money than any other candidate in the race,** other than a billionaire self-funder, in the first half of this year. Voters believe in her vision for California; that’s why she’s the clear frontrunner among Democrats in this race.

2. **The two leading Republicans raised a combined $2.5 million.** Far-right extremists have their eyes on California, and they’re putting money behind GOP candidates, including a County Sheriff and a former Fox News host.

3. **Some of our opponents have millions in the bank, just because they’ve been running for years(!) longer.** Katie has momentum, even though she only launched her campaign in the spring. But we have to make up ground before the critical communication window begins next year.

Here’s the TL;DR: if we keep doing what we’re doing, we’re going to elect Katie as the next governor of California. But we’ve got to keep our foot on the gas until every last ballot is cast and counted and Katie is sworn in.
**[We can’t do this without your support, Peter. Will you please chip in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250803_1_ak?refcode=em20250803-39965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39965_3422442_oweEeZ&akid=39965%2E3422442%2EoweEeZ)**

—Team KP26

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250803-39965&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39965_3422442_oweEeZ&akid=39965%2E3422442%2EoweEeZ)**

name: JanePAC Newsletter
subject: Your August edition of the JanePAC Monthly is here 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
With a new round of major updates you don't want to miss!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112673806/561245227/1328794144?refcode=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzODhjMmYwLTg3NzAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sh2pe9HYlhqBE8bCMobqw06ooZL6yhqkYztr6VGeSfo=&emci=b717baec-f86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
You're reading the August edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_** , and we're bringing you updates you don't want to miss! From Jane's inspiring remarks at Bloomberg Green in Seattle to a massive JanePAC victory in San Diego, last month delivered some serious momentum for our movement. We also have critical updates on the recent Kerr County floods and what they tell us about climate risks nationwide, plus important news about Trump's latest attacks on science through the EPA. Let's dive into everything that went down. 👇
* * *
**📰 JANE IN THE NEWS** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112673807/561245228/-803653937?v=1YyuvEvQxqo&t=150s&refcode=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzODhjMmYwLTg3NzAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sh2pe9HYlhqBE8bCMobqw06ooZL6yhqkYztr6VGeSfo=&emci=b717baec-f86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105) Jane addressed a room full of climate advocates at the Bloomberg Green conference in Seattle and delivered a powerful message: _“We have two essential crises, and for both, it's now or never: democracy and climate.”_ She emphasized the importance of our mission at JanePAC and the need to build a firewall against Trump. _“The most important thing is to elect climate champions up and down the ballot, all over the country, starting yesterday.”_ — Jane | [**WATCH JANE’S FULL REMARKS →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112673808/561245229/-803653937?v=1YyuvEvQxqo&t=150s&refcode=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzODhjMmYwLTg3NzAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sh2pe9HYlhqBE8bCMobqw06ooZL6yhqkYztr6VGeSfo=&emci=b717baec-f86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**🏆 CELEBRATING A MAJOR JANEPAC VICTORY**
JanePAC-endorsed candidate Paloma Aguirre won her special election for the San Diego County Board of Supervisors last month! This is a _major_ climate victory for a community desperately in need of environmental justice.
Paloma’s district is experiencing a catastrophic environmental emergency that hasn’t received nearly as much attention as it deserves. Millions of gallons of raw sewage, industrial waste, and other pollutants have been dumped into the Tijuana River. As a result, the local community has been exposed to toxic sewage, wastewater, and chemicals on a daily basis for years. It’s horrific.
As Mayor of Imperial Beach, Paloma has been leading the fight to tackle this crisis and provide much-needed relief to the community. On the Board of Supervisors, she’ll have an even larger platform to stand up to the polluters, deliver critical resources, and advocate for more federal assistance.
The news coming out of Washington is terrifying, but electing bold climate champions like Paloma at the local level is what keeps us going.
* * *
**🤝 ADVOCACY & VOLUNTEER HIGHLIGHTS**
The JanePAC Advocacy team came together in full force last month to fight back against the Trump administration’s assault on our environment, our democracy, and marginalized groups across the country. We organized several letter campaigns on key issues, ranging from PFAS protections to stopping ICE’s assaults on our communities to protecting our public lands from being sold off to the highest bidder. In total, our letter campaigns resulted in over 75,000 letters being sent to leaders in Washington to demand real change.
The biggest highlight: Due to the overwhelming pressure from people across the country, Utah Senator Mike Lee was forced to walk back a plan that would have forced the sale of millions of acres of public lands to developers. This win is a testament to what people power can do.
We're gearing up for major growth in our volunteer program this year. Whether it's phone-banking, canvassing, or helping spread the word in your community, there are plenty of ways to get involved and support our climate champions. **[Find upcoming opportunities here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112673809/561245230/-1641872660?refcode=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzODhjMmYwLTg3NzAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sh2pe9HYlhqBE8bCMobqw06ooZL6yhqkYztr6VGeSfo=&emci=b717baec-f86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)**

**🌊 EXTREME WEATHER UPDATE**
We want to thank everyone who donated to the Kerr County Flood Relief Fund last month. Your generosity helps support communities on the frontlines of extreme weather events — communities that are too often left to recover alone. The climate crisis touches all of us, and one of the most powerful things we can do as a movement is extend empathy and tangible support to our neighbors.
The tragic reality is that Kerr County won't be the last community that needs our help. A devastating new report from Grist reveals that the Texas flood was only a preview of what's to come for communities across America.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112673810/561245231/-24644573?refcode=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzODhjMmYwLTg3NzAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sh2pe9HYlhqBE8bCMobqw06ooZL6yhqkYztr6VGeSfo=&emci=b717baec-f86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
The factors that turned heavy rain into a deadly disaster in Texas exist nationwide: Climate change is supercharging storms, flood warnings aren't reaching people in time, and we keep building homes where water will inevitably rise. Countless communities are one storm away from the same tragedy.
[**READ THE FULL STORY →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112673811/561245232/-24644573?refcode=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzODhjMmYwLTg3NzAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sh2pe9HYlhqBE8bCMobqw06ooZL6yhqkYztr6VGeSfo=&emci=b717baec-f86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

**⚠️ EXPOSING TRUMP'S DIRTY FOSSIL FUEL AGENDA**
It feels like every day brings a more devastating attack on science from this administration.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112673812/561245233/-315396690?unlocked_article_code=1.aE8.j8uO.USy71N3ICS_J&smid=url-share&refcode=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzODhjMmYwLTg3NzAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sh2pe9HYlhqBE8bCMobqw06ooZL6yhqkYztr6VGeSfo=&emci=b717baec-f86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
Donald Trump's EPA chief, Lee Zeldin, announced a plan last week to revoke what’s known as the endangerment finding. This is a 2009 scientific declaration that greenhouse gases threaten public health, and it has given the government legal authority to combat climate change.
Without it, any future president loses the power to hold Big Polluters accountable or limit fossil fuel emissions.
This comes on top of Trump eliminating the EPA's entire scientific research arm — hundreds of chemists, biologists, and toxicologists who study health risks, test drinking water, and ensure the air we breathe is safe.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112673813/561245234/883861807?refcode=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzODhjMmYwLTg3NzAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sh2pe9HYlhqBE8bCMobqw06ooZL6yhqkYztr6VGeSfo=&emci=b717baec-f86e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1388c2f0-8770-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: With a new round of major updates you don't want to miss! | You're reading the August edition of The JanePAC Monthly , and we're bringing you updates you don't want to miss! From Jane's inspiring remarks at Bloomberg Green in Seattle to a massive JanePAC victory in San Diego, last month delivered some serious momentum for our movement. We also have critical updates on the recent Kerr County floods and what they tell us about climate risks nationwide, plus important news about Trump's latest attacks on science through the EPA. Let's dive into everything that went down. 👇 📰 JANE IN THE NEWS Jane addressed a room full of climate advocates at the Bloomberg Green conference in Seattle and delivered a powerful message: “We have two essential crises, and for both, it's now or never: democracy and climate.” She emphasized the importance of our mission at JanePAC and the need to build a firewall against Trump. “The most important thing is to elect climate champions up and down the ballot, all over the country, starting yesterday.” — Jane | 🏆 CELEBRATING A MAJOR JANEPAC VICTORY JanePAC-endorsed candidate Paloma Aguirre won her special election for the San Diego County Board of Supervisors last month! This is a major climate victory for a community desperately in need of environmental justice. Paloma’s district is experiencing a catastrophic environmental emergency that hasn’t received nearly as much attention as it deserves. Millions of gallons of raw sewage, industrial waste, and other pollutants have been dumped into the Tijuana River. As a result, the local community has been exposed to toxic sewage, wastewater, and chemicals on a daily basis for years. It’s horrific. As Mayor of Imperial Beach, Paloma has been leading the fight to tackle this crisis and provide much-needed relief to the community. On the Board of Supervisors, she’ll have an even larger platform to stand up to the polluters, deliver critical resources, and advocate for more federal assistance. The news coming out of Washington is terrifying, but electing bold climate champions like Paloma at the local level is what keeps us going. 🤝 ADVOCACY & VOLUNTEER HIGHLIGHTS The JanePAC Advocacy team came together in full force last month to fight back against the Trump administration’s assault on our environment, our democracy, and marginalized groups across the country. We organized several letter campaigns on key issues, ranging from PFAS protections to stopping ICE’s assaults on our communities to protecting our public lands from being sold off to the highest bidder. In total, our letter campaigns resulted in over 75,000 letters being sent to leaders in Washington to demand real change. The biggest highlight: Due to the overwhelming pressure from people across the country, Utah Senator Mike Lee was forced to walk back a plan that would have forced the sale of millions of acres of public lands to developers. This win is a testament to what people power can do. We're gearing up for major growth in our volunteer program this year. Whether it's phone-banking, canvassing, or helping spread the word in your community, there are plenty of ways to get involved and support our climate champions. 🌊 EXTREME WEATHER UPDATE We want to thank everyone who donated to the Kerr County Flood Relief Fund last month. Your generosity helps support communities on the frontlines of extreme weather events — communities that are too often left to recover alone. The climate crisis touches all of us, and one of the most powerful things we can do as a movement is extend empathy and tangible support to our neighbors. The tragic reality is that Kerr County won't be the last community that needs our help. A devastating new report from Grist reveals that the Texas flood was only a preview of what's to come for communities across America. The factors that turned heavy rain into a deadly disaster in Texas exist nationwide: Climate change is supercharging storms, flood warnings aren't reaching people in time, and we keep building homes where water will inevitably rise. Countless communities are one storm away from the same tragedy. ⚠️ EXPOSING TRUMP'S DIRTY FOSSIL FUEL AGENDA It feels like every day brings a more devastating attack on science from this administration. Donald Trump's EPA chief, Lee Zeldin, announced a plan last week to revoke what’s known as the endangerment finding. This is a 2009 scientific declaration that greenhouse gases threaten public health, and it has given the government legal authority to combat climate change. Without it, any future president loses the power to hold Big Polluters accountable or limit fossil fuel emissions. This comes on top of Trump eliminating the EPA's entire scientific research arm — hundreds of chemists, biologists, and toxicologists who study health risks, test drinking water, and ensure the air we breathe is safe. If you haven't already, Jane is asking supporters to share their thoughts with her about these devastating EPA cuts. That's it for this edition of The JanePAC Monthly. Thank you for being part of this movement. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team: Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And we're just getting started. – Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

What if I told you that I’m the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running to defeat Lauren Boebert? What if I told you that Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in the closest race in the country? What if I told you that Lauren Boebert is as unpopular as ever among voters? What if I told you that winning this seat would guarantee that we take back the House for Democrats in 2026? And what if I told you that we can finally send Lauren Boebert packing – but only if grassroots donors like you chip in now to my campaign? We need to raise another $7,500 before midnight tonight if we’re going to defeat Lauren Boebert and flip this seat blue, but right now, we’re still very short. The only way I’ll be able to fight back against the GOP Super PACs and win is if you give right now: [Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – every dollar you can afford before midnight – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9f4cf9c-8baa-4247-a45b-aca995d65be0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ll never be able to thank you enough for being on this team and joining me on this journey. My deepest gratitude, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3157ce73-2786-47fe-b225-b411785b22d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: Here is a code for 50% off your ticket to an evening with Congressman Louie Gohmert on August 9th... | | | | | == | Friend, Time is running out to secure tickets for our special event with Congressman Louie Gohmert. With just 5 days left, what is holding you back from attending? We have gone so far as to offer you 50% off your tickets to this intimate evening! Your attendance makes it possible for us to bring Congressman Gohmert to Colorado, not just for us, but for other conservative political organizations, such as the Arapahoe Tea Party. You can use code GOLDENAGE at checkout to recieve 50% off your tickets for this event. That means general admission is just $75. | == | == | Grassroots patriots like you make a difference in Colorado, and we are here to help you elect America First Conservatives to office, up and down the ballot. Many of you have buyer remorse on recent party decisions in Colorado, and if that is the case, this is where you can make a change and impact. We invite you to stand with us and Congressman Gohmert in the fight against the establishment! If you are unable to attend in person, we kindly ask that you consider making a contribution to our cause. This fight cannot be won without patriots like you! | | == | You can still get your tickets at 50% off now before time runs out! We hope to see you at the event, and we thank you for your attention to this matter. Best, | | == | Laurel Imer Chair Team Imer PAC | | == | | | == == == == | This email was paid for by Team Imer PAC and was not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. www.TeamImer.com | This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization from Team Imer PAC | | | | Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC | 16606 W 9th Avenue | Golden, CO 80401 US | | | | | | |

name: Carolina, United We Dream
subject: No matter what comes next, we know our home is here.
body:
Immigrant youth are being detained. Court orders are being disregarded. We must take immediate action. | | | Peter, imagine calling somewhere home for most of your life. You love your neighborhood, your school, and your community. **This place is all you’ve ever known.** Now, imagine that sense of home and stability is suddenly ripped away. **This is the reality that so many DACA recipients face.** DACA recipients are protected from deportation, but ICE’s escalating tactics put the rights of thousands of young people — our teachers, our coworkers, our family members, and our friends — at risk. The thing is, Peter, we’re no strangers to these attacks. United We Dream has defended our communities and immigrant youth at every turn. Attack after attack, we continue to show up and fight for each other in the streets, the courts, and in our neighborhoods. Together, we fought to keep the DACA program, and now, we must stand strong in the simple fact that **our home is here.** **To fight back, we need everyone off the sidelines to raise their voices in defense of those being detained, the families forcefully separated, and all immigrants who need permanent protections.** [**Please join the fight with a donation of $10, or any amount that fits your budget today. Your contribution will help us advocate for the dignity and justice of our communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAe0RdEA88FQgM72_uyS2_yvzewQVDcdCaOn6rfFD86dGw0zsjqPpdcflHrqE-emTelyY-TAsHUh_Wj5530LF4GK87leILf6opcXenK__39BxhZXlH-jwH6f3VjPbl_5h9ZxR99Ua0BCZBETHHgWMubfqT7rUGuIBiCdR1xuOpu348-cbEwYYqmkpFrNxyMrozJXL8uhYWFZ_TS-7gyIC8NU0rWmug2w5bgXeLsqaZNKce46yjQH2Cc_SW-r6ENet6zeJleuN9_LBxWeJ5jesX1SjrcZrf2RsXDRvzl5OIv-arxPC2uqbZRUWOFG1HPWpZ9-VOEK7mf7RL3jbd-tFuL3lIN4lD_O4SDW0mwBMMIT3jBUmUan2kvdFmuFh3O9uM4zQX6C_gFXBe0vD5X-qpdeRcxRJjVmeWtjqA8x67hogw/4iq/LYeb8BdDSeuiQz8Oy3dxZw/h0/h001.6-BzU34l7S7E4or2CU4J-r7TmffOiQkC7x7XK1dAfAQ) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAe0RdEA88FQgM72_uyS2_yvzewQVDcdCaOn6rfFD86dGw0zsjqPpdcflHrqE-emTelwfuGXKAK8_IJjm5LhdfInY4zkdrjvwGCCxteQBsnA1ZRudhkdc_JDYkqQDHTBUOn1a4uIuAbzQEXvyqJ0fF4pe8kJcu-CTSB19FyC8-SbVo0ppJ8SGpf8oNUxsaneo5VKzo5R68AJU6I5TTk8NP-WrA8vHhWKtWS34lnerviezCaaSACFmY27GKVFVIh3Sbwk93hD-OJEuO9XFV9HhYAmNt4cZ5uWXUGkaZu3R8dAS_y4myV9Xm2vJDnBzmLlNAT_0aC2rT5UMOkBVmW-Aq0HF2Za5q8mA5drO-f_9ZvM-skQ7D_mJEfE1hQFqw8WrZ1wwmljmZkrfgFakbYihtguoDBYZIKAqnQutlwSwjWjGDABWRH_BqGl8EGRhn7CDeD/4iq/LYeb8BdDSeuiQz8Oy3dxZw/h1/h001.gnB5iw_mDl43E-Zpg7z_iHsiaY8qdIG3Ok9rShrcheQ)

clean_body: Immigrant youth are being detained. Court orders are being disregarded. We must take immediate action. | | | Peter, imagine calling somewhere home for most of your life. You love your neighborhood, your school, and your community. This place is all you’ve ever known. Now, imagine that sense of home and stability is suddenly ripped away. This is the reality that so many DACA recipients face. DACA recipients are protected from deportation, but ICE’s escalating tactics put the rights of thousands of young people — our teachers, our coworkers, our family members, and our friends — at risk. The thing is, Peter, we’re no strangers to these attacks. United We Dream has defended our communities and immigrant youth at every turn. Attack after attack, we continue to show up and fight for each other in the streets, the courts, and in our neighborhoods. Together, we fought to keep the DACA program, and now, we must stand strong in the simple fact that our home is here. To fight back, we need everyone off the sidelines to raise their voices in defense of those being detained, the families forcefully separated, and all immigrants who need permanent protections. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. No matter what comes next, we know our home is here. Thank you, Carolina, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

_**“SHE WILL NOT LET YOU DOWN”**_
Friend, in the critical upcoming special election for Florida’s U.S. Senate seat, I am honored to tell you that **I just received President Trump’s total and complete endorsement!**
**My name is Ashley Moody, and I’ve been serving in the U.S. Senate on a temporary basis since Marco Rubio became our top diplomat – _but now it’s time to win this seat outright. _**
I’m a fifth-generation Floridian, former judge and Attorney General, wife of a law enforcement officer, and mother to two wonderful boys.
W _e can win this seat, but to be honest, history is stacked against us._
**Typically, the president’s party averages a FOUR-SEAT LOSS in Senate midterm elections. If that happens, say hello to Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and goodbye to any forward movement on President Trump’s agenda.**
_I don’t need to tell you what a disaster that would be for this country._
**[President Trump put his faith in me to win this critical special election, and now I’d like to ask for yours. body:
With Trump and his state-side allies wreaking havoc, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. | | |
---
| |
---|---

body:
FIRST: Trump tried to overturn the election, fueled an insurrection, and installed loyalists across government to shield himself from accountability.
NEXT: He instructed his DHS to start ARRESTING elected officials who spoke out against ICE's cruel and unconstitutional tactics
NOW: He’s targeting ActBlue with an Executive Order that instructs the DOJ to target and investigate it.
DO YOU SEE WHAT'S HAPPENING HERE???
ActBlue is the infrastructure that powers everyything from school board races to the fight to flip the House. It’s the tool MILLIONS of grassroots donors use to fight for reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, climate action, and more.
And Trump has declared war on it.
We launched an emergency $25,000 response fund to push back. If we don’t act now, the right will see our silence as weakness. Chip in $7 or more before tomorrow's CRUCIAL end of month fundraising deaadline to show we will not be silenced, defunded, or dismantled. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=080325_2]

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: What being fierce means to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Let me tell you about one of my favorite phrases
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3581%2E400544%2EDJkS0m)
Let me tell you about one of my favorite phrases: **Be Fierce.**
Why do I love it? Because it perfectly describes my outlook on life.
**It means rolling up our sleeves to do the hard things and fight for what’s right.**
But being fierce doesn’t come easy. It’s earned through perseverance. It’s realized by facing challenges head-on and helping each other overcome them.
It doesn’t matter what’s standing in our way if we’re standing together.
That’s why I’m asking you to be fierce and stand with me as we build the fiercest grassroots campaign New Mexico has ever seen. I’m running to be Governor of New Mexico because I understand the challenges New Mexicans are facing. And I know we can solve them together.
**[Will you chip in a $5 contribution now to power our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250803_1_befierce?amount=5&refcode=em20250803-3581&refcode2=3581_400544_DJkS0m&akid=3581%2E400544%2EDJkS0m)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250803_1_befierce?amount=5&refcode=em20250803-3581&refcode2=3581_400544_DJkS0m&akid=3581%2E400544%2EDJkS0m)**
I’m so grateful to everyone who has already stepped up to show their support. If we keep up this momentum, nothing can stop us from winning this fight together.
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250803-1&t=2&refcode2=3581_400544_DJkS0m&akid=3581%2E400544%2EDJkS0m)**

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3581%2E400544%2EDJkS0m)

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Redistricting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
As you know, the Trump presidency ends in November of next year if the American people are given a fair chance to elect enough Democrats to take back Congress.

Team —
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my Campaign for Democracy PAC. But because I try not to ask often, you deserve to know why today is different.
This is about redistricting. Let me explain.
As you know, we have a chance to effectively end the Trump presidency in November of next year – if the American people are given a fair chance to elect enough Democrats to take back Congress.
Donald Trump recognizes this, so he wants to rig the game. Republicans are very good at this. Democrats play by one set of widely accepted rules, and Republicans create their own to seize power at any cost.
So Trump calls Greg Abbott in Texas and says I need you to redraw your Congressional maps to find five House seats. Abbott quickly obliges.
So now what?
Well, California is not going to sit back and watch this happen. We're not going to play by the old rules if it means risking the very survival of our democracy.
If Texas wants to redraw their maps, California will fight fire with fire.
But I can't do this alone. In our state, it will actually require a vote of the people. A vote we can win, but an election that will be expensive with Republicans spending whatever it takes to stop us.
That's why I am asking:
[**Please make a contribution to my Campaign for Democracy PAC today. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. It will all add up fast if people are giving what they can. But mostly, I need to know you're with me before we press forward.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-25?source=em250803&refcode2=2415_4767699_8k8bLy&akid=2415%2E4767699%2E8k8bLy)

We can't stand by and watch democracy, the rule of law, and America’s co-equal branches of government be consistently degraded by Trump.
We're going to fight back.
Gavin Newsom

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m investigating Elon Musk’s claims about Trump’s ties to Epstein
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Trump’s own senior advisor just accused him of being involved with America’s worst child predator and using his power to cover up his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, friend. And as a member of the House Judiciary Committee, _**I’m not letting this go.**_ Trump thinks he’s untouchable. He thinks if he stacks the courts, bullies the DOJ, and surrounds himself with cronies willing to look the other way, he’ll get away with everything. Again. **But not if I have anything to say about it.** Friend, my relentless investigations into Donald Trump and his insurrection are why Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans kicked me off the House Intelligence Committee two years ago. **And now that I’m digging into Elon Musk’s allegations against Trump on the House Judiciary Committee, I know the bullseye is on my back again.** [**They’ve already tried to silence me — and failed. But now, I need your help to make sure I can continue speaking truth to power in the House. Can you split a donation of $25 — or whatever you can — between me and Seth Moulton to make sure I can hold Trump accountable for his crimes as our investigations ramp up?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112678745/561263163/-288956247?refcode=2507803_MFC_Swalwell_MuskClaims&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWE2ZDMzZC05YTcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ycqRj_Jy2SxjEsypUUxO93HeU3Z_--OTvHqq2tP-L-g=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112678746/561263164/-288956247?refcode=2507803_MFC_Swalwell_MuskClaims&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWE2ZDMzZC05YTcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ycqRj_Jy2SxjEsypUUxO93HeU3Z_--OTvHqq2tP-L-g=) Trump’s circle has turned into a confession booth, friend. **Now it’s our job to make sure they can’t bury the evidence — or the truth.** Thanks for having my back. — Eric

clean_body: | Trump’s own senior advisor just accused him of being involved with America’s worst child predator and using his power to cover up his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, friend. And as a member of the House Judiciary Committee, I’m not letting this go. Trump thinks he’s untouchable. He thinks if he stacks the courts, bullies the DOJ, and surrounds himself with cronies willing to look the other way, he’ll get away with everything. Again. But not if I have anything to say about it. Friend, my relentless investigations into Donald Trump and his insurrection are why Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans kicked me off the House Intelligence Committee two years ago. And now that I’m digging into Elon Musk’s allegations against Trump on the House Judiciary Committee, I know the bullseye is on my back again. = = Trump’s circle has turned into a confession booth, friend. Now it’s our job to make sure they can’t bury the evidence — or the truth. Thanks for having my back. — Eric [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: Team Baldwin
subject: This is just the start
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4904%2E35263%2ExVCgif)
Peter — Tammy just introduced a groundbreaking package of bills to make life more affordable in Wisconsin. Tammy's affordability agenda will lower the cost of purchasing a home for first-time homebuyers, ensure families can find and afford high-quality child care, and crack down on big corporations’ price gouging. President Trump promised to lower costs for Wisconsinites — instead, he’s kicking hundreds of thousands of Wisconsinites off their health insurance and making life more expensive for hard-working families to give tax breaks to his wealthy allies. To fix what Trump has broken and secure a more affordable future for every Wisconsinite, Tammy needs our full support behind this. **[Please, voice your support for Tammy’s affordability agenda by adding your name to our petition today:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/affordability-agenda/?refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250803_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4904%2E35263%2ExVCgif)** | | [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/affordability-agenda/?refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250803_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4904%2E35263%2ExVCgif)
---
Thank you,
Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4904%2E35263%2ExVCgif) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4904%2E35263%2ExVCgif)**

To fix what Trump has broken and secure a more affordable future for every Wisconsinite, Tammy needs our full support behind this. | | Thank you, Team Baldwin P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701 | mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Yeah, I'm a bro with a podcast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250803-587&t=1001&akid=587%2E251025%2E_Lwi4Q ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250803-587&t=1002&akid=587%2E251025%2E_Lwi4Q ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

I’m a proud Michigander, a doctor, a dad, and a former public health
director.

And yeah, I’m a bro with a podcast.

[ Abdul ]Abdul saying 'Yeah, I'm a bro with a podcast'

Since 2019, I’ve hosted a podcast called America Dissected, in which I
dive deep into the science, culture, and policies that shape our health.
We’ve done over 233 episodes covering all sorts of topics – from the
opioid crisis and the COVID-19 pandemic, to ultra-processed foods, and
even the health of America’s pets.

[ America ]America DissectedWhen it comes to public health in America, there’s *a
lot* to talk about.

I started this podcast because I love talking about the issues I’m
determined to solve.

But here’s the thing,
Peter: I know it’s *just as
important* to listen.

That’s what we do in each episode. We spotlight a special guest who’s an
expert in their field, and we take the time to listen to what they have to
say and what they stand for.

Listening to — and actually hearing — everyone is the only way we’ll win
this people-powered campaign for Michigan. Michigan is a purple state, so
we can’t expect to win this race by only speaking with people who always
vote blue.

To bring new supporters on board, we’ll need to go out of our way to
listen to people who feel like the current system has failed them. And we
will make sure they know they have a voice in this campaign, too.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250803-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250803-587&refcode2=587_251025__Lwi4Q&akid=587%2E251025%2E_Lwi4Q ]Listening to the struggles, ideas, and hopes of hardworking
Michiganders is more than the right thing to do,
Peter. It’s how we win. Please
chip in $10 so we can plan our next campaign stops and meet
as many voters as possible.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250803-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250803-587&refcode2=587_251025__Lwi4Q&akid=587%2E251025%2E_Lwi4Q ]Donate $10 ››

I’m beyond grateful for every donation, big and small, that helps fund
more campaign events where we can chat with people from all walks of life.
And trust me, I’m prepared to talk with voters until my voice gives out.

We’re not taking a single penny from corporate PACs, because this campaign
belongs to you, not the wannabe oligarchs who spend millions to corrupt
our political system. That means every door we knock, every ad we run,
every conversation we have is funded by grassroots supporters like you.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250803-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250803-587&refcode2=587_251025__Lwi4Q&akid=587%2E251025%2E_Lwi4Q ]Will you donate $10 to help us reach
more Michiganders across the state?

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=587%2E251025%2E_Lwi4Q
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=587%2E251025%2E_Lwi4Q

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: America’s greatest strength
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Donald Trump and Republicans think diversity is dangerous, Peter. They’re wrong. **Diversity is America’s greatest strength, and I’ll do everything in my power to protect it. ** As hate crimes continue to rise across the country, and Donald Trump purges diversity efforts and weaponizes equity to uphold white supremacy, I’m proud to lead legislation reaffirming that diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility are the fundamental values that make the United States great. I’m from a state that has the nation’s largest share of multiracial Americans. In Hawaii, diversity isn’t something to be feared. We embrace it. That’s why I’m fighting in the Senate to ensure that our communities are not erased and have a seat at the table. **[Diversity is our strength and our superpower, Peter. If you agree, add your name today to support my work protecting diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112680073/561267810/-1693385075?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250803_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzI3ZWZhMC1hMTcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFuJf-Df7rB_OL8MZZ4XEfovAkvo632DaV6KqRdsT6M=&emci=0c143c10-276e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0727efa0-a170-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23190490)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112680075/561267821/-1693385075?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250803_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzI3ZWZhMC1hMTcwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFuJf-Df7rB_OL8MZZ4XEfovAkvo632DaV6KqRdsT6M=&emci=0c143c10-276e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0727efa0-a170-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23190490)

clean_body: | Donald Trump and Republicans think diversity is dangerous, Peter. They’re wrong. Diversity is America’s greatest strength, and I’ll do everything in my power to protect it. As hate crimes continue to rise across the country, and Donald Trump purges diversity efforts and weaponizes equity to uphold white supremacy, I’m proud to lead legislation reaffirming that diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility are the fundamental values that make the United States great. I’m from a state that has the nation’s largest share of multiracial Americans. In Hawaii, diversity isn’t something to be feared. We embrace it. That’s why I’m fighting in the Senate to ensure that our communities are not erased and have a seat at the table. | Thank you, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

clean_body: Peter, the USPS is under attack. Add your name now >> | | There are two clear possibilities here: Option 1: We do nothing and allow MAGA Republicans to gut a critical public service that is critical to democracy. Option 2: We fight back to protect USPS offices, postal workers, and the millions of Americans who rely on the USPS to mail-in vote, receive medication, and pay critical bills. House Democrats are demanding answers and pushing legislation to protect the USPS from partisan sabotage. But we need a surge of grassroots support to show the American people are watching and ready to fight! — Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. name: Haley Stevens
subject: What Michigan means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
My love letter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=488%2E49239%2EsxkLv_)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4240?t=2&akid=488%2E49239%2EsxkLv_)
---
Hi null, it’s Haley.

I’ve been thinking a lot about the people I talk to every day across Michigan and what this state means to me. So I wrote something from the heart:
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4241?t=3&akid=488%2E49239%2EsxkLv_)
_My love letter to Michigan –_
_The high five of America_
_The heartbeat of our industrial sector and manufacturing,_
_Where cherries get grown and young minds thrive._
_My life’s work and calling is to always fight for you._
I’m proud to be born and raised in Michigan. And I’m proud to be in this race and fighting for Michiganders every day.
This campaign isn’t about gimmicks or political points: It’s about people. It’s about fighting like hell for the people we love and for the working families who make Michigan what it is.
But Trump and his MAGA allies are actively working against Michiganders’ best interests – from reckless tariffs that are causing costs to skyrocket to tax cuts that hurt working folks and fill his billionaire buddies’ pockets. Donald Trump’s chaos agenda is too dangerous for Michigan.
The GOP is already flooding Michigan with millions to try and buy this seat. And experts are saying this race will be one of the most expensive and competitive in the country. That’s why I’m asking: **[Will you chip in $5 now to help me keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4241?t=4&akid=488%2E49239%2EsxkLv_)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4241?t=5&akid=488%2E49239%2EsxkLv_)
---
Thank you for believing in me. And in Michigan.

With love and grit,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4335?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=488%2E49239%2EsxkLv_) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4240?t=7&akid=488%2E49239%2EsxkLv_)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=488%2E49239%2EsxkLv_)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Voter Survey [Voter Action Project]
subject: Trump firing the nonpartisan economic statistics official?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NYT: Trump Fires BLS Commissioner, Claiming Weak Jobs Numbers Were ‘Rigged’ [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NYT_Trump_BLSChiefFired.png]
President Trump unleashed his fury about weakness in the labor market recently, saying without evidence that the data were “rigged” and then firing the bipartisanly Senate-confirmed Department of Labor official responsible for pulling together the numbers each month.
The president fired the official after the bureau released monthly jobs data showing surprisingly weak hiring in July and large downward revisions to job growth in the previous two months. The report was widely interpreted as evidence that Mr. Trump’s policies were beginning to take a toll on the economy. Economists are now worried that ousting the head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics could undermine confidence in government economic data.
The firing prompted swift criticism from economists, former government officials and others, who said the removal would further erode trust in government statistics and make it more difficult for policymakers, investors and businesses, who rely on having dependable data about the economy to make decisions. In addition to the monthly jobs numbers, the Bureau of Labor Statistics is responsible for producing data on inflation, wages and other aspects of the economy.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on this news. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Trump be firing nonpartisan officials for releasing data that doesn't align with his own political outlook?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080325_1&amount=20]

[](https://substack.com/redirect/9e12eb24-b8ff-4c5d-9bf6-2002e798485c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem recently completed a three-country tour in South America to capitalize on the momentum the Trump administration has with ensuring illegal immigrants and hardened criminals do not reach the United States' southern border.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..LzeB7Q4iI7hi3aDdtkCsLhrAq436Fn8D-9_ydHmcF4w?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170029964)
Noem and her team traveled to Argentina, Chile, and Ecuador. While it is all considered Latin America, each country and its politics are unique in terms of how the United States approaches them to help combat the various factions that want to have open borders.
In Argentina, President Javier Milei and his administration are **[more than happy to work with the United States](https://substack.com/redirect/42730e5a-e343-4d0c-aca0-c4d16f4143e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to meet the thresholds required to be part of the Visa Waiver Program once again. The Trump administration says the country is a prime candidate to be in the VWP because Argentinians have the lowest visa overstay rate in Latin America.
Argentina was part of the VWP but it was removed in 2002 after many of its citizens started to stay in the U.S. illegally past the 90-day limit due to economic hardships. Noem also signed agreements to streamline repatriations and to put safeguards in place so certain hardened criminals are not immediately released from custody once they are back in Argentina.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**

# **Don't Let Decades of Hard Work Lose Value Disappear Overnight**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d6f9c14b-b8d2-41e8-b96c-c6b94f8b7948?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
