# **[HELP PROTECT YOUR FAMILY'S FUTURE WITH GOLDCO](https://substack.com/redirect/d6f9c14b-b8d2-41e8-b96c-c6b94f8b7948?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
You've spent your entire career building something meaningful. Through early mornings, long hours, and countless sacrifices, you've created a nest egg meant to secure your family's future. But with markets at record highs and economic uncertainty looming, that lifetime of dedication could be at risk.
Many hard-working Americans are already taking action. They're diversifying beyond stocks and bonds into something that's helped protect wealth for over 5,000 years: **physical gold**.
Gold has historically served as a hedge against inflation, currency devaluation, and market crashes--the very threats facing American families today.
**Goldco specializes in helping Americans like you** roll over existing 401(k)s and IRAs into Gold IRAs.
Don't wait until it's too late. The families who act now will likely thank themselves tomorrow.
**Call Goldco today at 855-823-GOLD or click[here ](https://substack.com/redirect/d6f9c14b-b8d2-41e8-b96c-c6b94f8b7948?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)for your FREE Gold & Silver Kit!**
[Get My Free Gold & Silver Kit](https://substack.com/redirect/d6f9c14b-b8d2-41e8-b96c-c6b94f8b7948?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
Chile is a different story. The country's president is a far-leftist who is not shy to criticize President Donald Trump. However, like the United States, Gabriel Boric had to deal with the large influx of Venezuelans in his country and the problems that sprang up, namely dealing with Tren de Aragua. With a population of nearly 20 million, over one million of those people are Venezuelans.
Unlike far-leftists in the United States, Boric realized if he wants to have any chance to be reelected, he was going to have to take measures to address public safety threats like TdA.
That is why **[Chile is going to work with the United States](https://substack.com/redirect/cc043dd0-0aaa-4630-b033-c308e3fb61b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to be fully integrated into the Biometric Identification Transnational Migration Alert Program. The program will be used to help screen out potential public safety threats attempting to enter the United States from Chile, along with helping Chile's law enforcement of identifying those threats residing in their country.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..LzeB7Q4iI7hi3aDdtkCsLhrAq436Fn8D-9_ydHmcF4w?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170029964)
All of that to say is the Trump administration is exposing the farce the Biden-Harris administration was putting on in their attempts to "address" the border crisis they deliberately created. Harken back to how at the very beginning, Joe Biden tasked his DEI-hire of a vice president to solve the "root causes" of illegal immigration within Central America.
How did Harris work on the issue? All she accomplished was creating a viral meme template by telling people while she was in Guatemala: "Do not come. Do not come." Did illegal immigrants listen to her? No, of course not and the data from U.S. Customs and Border Protection prove it. Sure, the Biden-Harris administration was telling people to not illegally enter the U.S. but their _policies_ were proving to those same people that they could invade our nation.
Now under Trump 2.0, not only does our secured border tell those who waited too long that the opportunity has passed, but their home nation is going to actually work with the U.S. to deter them from leaving in the first place. The policies finally match with the messaging coming from the federal government.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..LzeB7Q4iI7hi3aDdtkCsLhrAq436Fn8D-9_ydHmcF4w?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170029964)
There is still a long way to go within South America. While we have some strong allies and countries who may not fully like us, but will work with us, there are other places like Brazil and Colombia where we are nearly still at square one.
Ultimately, the more deals the Trump administration makes within the continent, the more pressure is put on those adversarial nations who would rather thumb their noses at us. Even if they want to try to run out the clock on Trump since he can't run for president again, it's not a guarantee much would change with, say, a JD Vance administration.
The tides are changing as foreign nations know the time of taking advantage of "los gringos" is over. Noem put in the work of flying far south and packed a busy schedule to be Trump's surrogate on this important issue. The deals made this week confirm they are doing more than paying lip service. As always with Latin America on the topic of immigration, it will be up to the U.S. to ensure our partners are holding up their end of the deal.
* * *

Here’s the truth, team:

House Republicans closed up shop early for summer — all to avoid accountability.

They’re hiding from town halls, ducking tough questions, and refusing to face the people they’re supposed to represent. Meanwhile, they’re lying about the real impact of their cruel budget cuts and distracting everyone from Trump’s scandalous ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

Jason Crow sees right through it.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: 107 Days
body:
Since leaving office, I've spent a lot of time thinking about our presidential campaign: what I saw, what I learned, and what I know it will take to move forward.

Since leaving office, I've spent a lot of time thinking about our presidential campaign: what I saw, what I learned, and what I know it will take to move forward.
I've compiled it in a book called _**107 Days._**
It comes out in September and I hope you'll read it. **[Here's a little bit more about what you can expect when you do.](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/3045?t=1&akid=691%2E2563979%2EkcVVBG)**
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/3045?t=2&akid=691%2E2563979%2EkcVVBG)
What the world saw on the campaign trail was only part of the story.
Thank you,
Kamala

Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=691%2E2563979%2EkcVVBG)**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Texas Democrats broke quorum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.
But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. **They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote.**
And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders.
They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for.
Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. Only if we all contribute what we can will they have the resources to keep up the fight.
[**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to Powered by People and support these brave lawmakers?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250803-1.5ugrq5&refcode=ema20250803-240266&t=2&akid=240266%2E444211%2EfguUKR)

name: Eric Flores
subject: I’ll never forget his face when the guilty plea came in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Flores for Congress
body:
I had just put one of Texas’ most wanted predators behind bars.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aV4x/?__vbtrk=MzA4MTMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA4MTMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

I’ll never forget the look in his eyes when the guilty plea came in.

**_I had just put one of Texas’ most wanted predators behind bars._**

Moments like that remind me of who I’m fighting for — and why I’ll never back down.

Friend, my name is Eric Flores — Assistant US Attorney, Army infantryman, faithful follower of Christ, and one damn-proud Pro-Trump Conservative.

When the DC Establishment turned their backs on Americans, I stepped up – _by joining the Army and standing guard at the southern border and by locking up human traffickers as a federal prosecutor._

**And today I’m taking it one step further by throwing my hat in the ring for the biggest House race in Texas.**

I’ve taken down cartels, locked up traffickers, and now I’m going after the career politicians who left you behind.

**_[I believe God put me on this path — and I’m humbly asking for your help to keep going.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aV4x/?__vbtrk=MzA4MTMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA4MTMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**

This race isn’t about me — it’s about standing up for every forgotten American.

**__Will you stand with me?__**

[STAND WITH ME TODAY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aV4x/?__vbtrk=MzA4MTMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA4MTMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

### Cliff's Note
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff3e2ab9-f149-4658-b289-1cecf05d2cda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

### **Trump 's Reached HIS Stalin Phase Right On Schedule **
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7263b87-97c5-47f1-a0d5-902e42828dcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Some of us always knew this was where this would end up.** A bloated, stumbling, smash-and-grab, cash-licking cadaver who spent an entire life born on third base--yet somehow finding a way to get thrown out at second--taking out his vast wilderness of dumbf*kery on us all.
But we were sooo crazy!
Yes, this is what we we were told--like when we said if Hillary lost in 2016 Roe v. Wade would be overturned--in asking various "business class" Republicans "voting for the man not the policy," far leftists who couldn't lower their haughty superegos to vote for Kamala Harris or our grotesque monopoly media jonesing for clicks like Jake Tapper searching for a book to adorn with his name, WTF are you doing?!?
Special mention here to Merrick Garland, Great Protector of the image of institutions just so he could enable said institutions to be completely destroyed roughly 12-24 months later.
Bravo, Merrick, bravo. For possessing markedly more foreskin than foresight.
So, we're there. The Corruptor-in-Chief has now crossed a few more bright red lines. No, this time he's not firing some former circus-act C-list celebrity from his sh*tty reality show, it's the the government. Our government.
**And Trump just canned the head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS).** Because, _gasp,_ the jobs numbers didn't praise Dear Cheater, they just told us about the actual, ya know, jobs.
That's right, folks. Donald Jong-Un booted the BLS chief faster than he fled Vietnam War service--though in his defense, it was hard to run with that mass infiltration of bone spurs--simply because the numbers didn't lie...which is all that Trump can do.
It turns out that when you constantly do [the TACO Trump with tariffs](https://substack.com/redirect/bba1e3e8-f8d0-4d22-bf75-a1e7289bf8d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), nobody freakin knows what gonna fly out of your cheese-melt of a cerebral cortex next, so they don't hire, purchase equipment, really expand their business at all.
I know, nutty, right!?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ae9a912-2008-472c-8ff6-c5d2162bbf6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I mean, look at these jobs numbers? When Trump adds an extra caddie [to help him cheat at golf ](https://substack.com/redirect/42f730f4-e616-47cb-a07b-3b98171c503a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)at creates more jobs. This is not just humiliating, it's I had 1000 FBI agents working 24-hour shifts [to try and hide my appearance in the Epstein files](https://substack.com/redirect/44ca2760-45ab-4ace-b055-524ef39bbda0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), humiliating.
So Trump did the political equivalent of shooting the weatherman because it's raining. Now of course he had to do it in his Trumpian way, undermining yet another American institution, the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS). Trump's called it partisan and pro-Kamala and blah blah blah can this man ever shut that giant cakehole?
Where's Marie Antoinette when you need her? I mean, she's just his kinda gal.
In any case, here we'll share the oral droppings of the unhinged, the one for whom so many irredeemably daft dill-holes actually cast a vote. Not to sit in a dunking booth at the Florida State Fair or don a bucket on his head. But to be President.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d6d6d803-e7b2-4972-af40-faec7a7e5d27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Why, that feels familiar. Hmm. Oh, right, this is what I was thinking of:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ab4220de-fb14-45be-921c-35ded99ea006?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
`Folks, The Number of New Paid Subscribers has Dramatically Slowed this Past Week. Without Them, We Can't Continue to Expand The Soundcheck Fund--Just as Trump Kills the Corporation for Public Broadcasting. Please Consider a Paid Subscription to Support the Growth of Independent Media `
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.iyaOgNjhAzTD4OZrIBQJkKX51PtNM1MpnioGOohEXhk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170019428)
Put an economic plan in place that causes an utter catastrophe, and blame those counting the numbers. How very hammer and sickle of Trump!
And just to make sure we're all clear this is not a single data point, but a direction, We know about the masked, badge-lacking [thugs of ICE, throwing teenagers--even U.S. citizens--to the ground](https://substack.com/redirect/3be5b105-f5d7-4378-a676-de956bf97b46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) because they look suspiciously Latino.
But now Trump's added to his Stalin-esque resume by opening an investigation into Jack Smith. Remember him, the prosecutor who had the audacity to investigate Trump's attempted coup, his crimes, and, well, his dictatorship-in-progress (bet he's also thanking Merrick Garland about now).
Stalin would be so proud of his Little Trump.
In fact, if he'd spray-tanned himself into a clownfish and swapped out military garb for a 48-long golf polo, we'd have a match! From 1936-38, to cement his control vs his rival, Leon Trotsky (whom he later had murdered in Mexico), Stalin held mass purges. The Moscow trials, to rid Mother Russia of those who could hold the homonculus heel to account.
You know, for things like ignoring and covering up a Stalin-induced famine from 1932-33. The one that led to five-to-nine million deaths (it'll shock you to know they were mostly in Ukraine, because, Russia...always doing right by Ukraine).
**I believe it was known as Stalin 's COVID.**
Remember when Trump said "I'll be your retribution?"
So now he's got MAGA sycophants in Congress, [red-state governors openly ignoring state constitutions to gerrymand...er cheat for him](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5dadd7-ed4a-45e1-b3bd-81e4f326802a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), right-wing entertainment complex Outriders and an entire Justice Department apparently moonlighting as his personal vendetta squad.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ea0c65a-b577-4add-af76-c8d7a4ccff70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Outriders from Avengers: Infinity Wars_
So Trump's now openly cribbing from the "Totalitarianism for Dummies" playbook: Fire the statisticians, jail the prosecutors, silence the press (see NPR and PBS shutting down, [which we just wrote about](https://substack.com/redirect/44ca2760-45ab-4ace-b055-524ef39bbda0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and claim you're "making America great again."
Yeah, Stalin said something similar to that too--though in his case it was "glorious motherland" instead of "greatness." And he probably didn't tweet it at 3 a.m. from a gauche golden s*tter in Mar-a-Novosibirsk. But the logic's the same: when reality doesn't flatter a lifetime loser, don't change your actions--change reality!
Or in Trump's case, investigate reality for "election interference."
This isn't just Trump being Trump. This is Trump being Stalin, Mao, being every tinpot dictator who couldn't handle bad press, bad numbers or really, _really_ bad hair. Whose flaccidly, fragile ego was only matched by their appetite for revenge.
This is important: **Don 't fall into Learned Helplessness.** There's good news out there too: judges standing up to Trump what feels like every day--even his appointees--huge rallies across the country surpassing numbers political scientists say are needed to stop autocracy, [enormously popular talents jumping into key Senate races](https://substack.com/redirect/80f98587-d905-4661-ae7a-b38017ecc257?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And efforts like our own,[ the Soundcheck Fund, to build up independent media](https://substack.com/redirect/965bf163-da60-46bc-9337-7ac5035343fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and finally cast off corporate media for good.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1603ae40-8feb-4181-aeec-7d9c1934b260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But this is a battle for our very democracy, _which means we fight on every front_. If we don't stop **this** kind of authoritarianism in our federal government, we won't be debating jobs numbers or indictments--we'll be debating whether it's "legal" to criticize Trump at all.
Unless, of course, the new "Bureau of Labor Statistics and Loyalty" tells us it's actually _great_ that we're unemployed--because now we have more time to attend Trump rallies!
Comrade Stalin would definitely approve.
* * *
**VIDEO ON DEMAND! Like I said above, there is good news. Here 's Cory Booker calling out FELLOW DEMOCRATS to get tougher on Trump & GOP colleagues. **_**This is what I 'm here for**_**.**_**But we need more of this. It can 't just be once then done.**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7e5e1038-7eb3-4474-ada2-163b00cbb89c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
As Trump fires and investigates the truth tellers, we again remind you this [is why we created ](https://substack.com/redirect/da59d12f-84cf-49c9-8e51-a71868512a02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Blue Amp's Soundcheck Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/da59d12f-84cf-49c9-8e51-a71868512a02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**--to build a people-powered, independent media army that answers to you, not monopolies or Trump suck-ups.
**[This is why democracy desperately needs YOU to step up.](https://substack.com/redirect/da59d12f-84cf-49c9-8e51-a71868512a02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

If we don't stop this kind of authoritarianism in our federal government, we won't be debating jobs numbers or indictments--we'll be debating whether it's "legal" to criticize Trump at all. Unless, of course, the new "Bureau of Labor Statistics and Loyalty" tells us it's actually great that we're unemployed--because now we have more time to attend Trump rallies! Comrade Stalin would definitely approve. VIDEO ON DEMAND! Like I said above, there is good news. Here 's Cory Booker calling out FELLOW DEMOCRATS to get tougher on Trump & GOP colleagues. This is what I 'm here for.But we need more of this. It can 't just be once then done. As Trump fires and investigates the truth tellers, we again remind you this build a people-powered, independent media army that answers to you, not monopolies or Trump suck-ups. 👉🏽 If you believe in democracy... 👉🏽 If you believe the truth still matters... 👉🏽 If you don't want every news source to be bought by billionaires... . And support the Soundcheck Fund.** --Cliff You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

| Hi Peter - did you see Jonathan Nez's last message? His opponent, Eli Crane, said that releasing the Epstein files is "something that I've supported from day one." Yet when it came down to it, he was one of 211 House Republicans who voted to block the release of the files. The bottom line is: **Just one Republican with a spine would have tipped the scale and given the American people greater transparency on the Epstein saga. ** Arizona's 2nd District deserves who actually listens to what they want, and Jonathan Nez has spent his life listening and caring for others. name: POLL FROM TRUMP
subject: Is the landing gear out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

body:
With your help, we can turn the tide one seat at a time, and your support is crucial to our success. | | |
---

Did you know that state Democrats are facing TWO flip opportunities in Georgia and Iowa this month? **📍In Georgia,** Democratic candidate Debra Shigley is running a close race in a GOP stronghold. **📍In Iowa,** Democrats are facing a toss-up special election that would break the GOP’s supermajority in the state Senate. body:
You may have missed this one, but we sure didn't.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112683039/561277953/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-03_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE2MzkwZWEtYmI3MC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=99f5F3F6x-wjNMdxIYFppq5-frOkRjZvYGzFa7KFAwc=)
Peter, you may have missed this one, but we sure didn't: Glenn Youngkin just held a political event in Iowa, according to _The Washington Post._
And in a few weeks, he's going to headline a swanky GOP dinner in South Carolina.
It seems Youngkin is more interested in stoking rumors that he'll run for president in 2028 than focusing on the challenges facing Virginia or campaigning for his hand-picked successor, Winsome Earle-Sears.
All we have to say is this: _November 4th can't come soon enough._
Abigail Spanberger is running for Governor to focus on the issues affecting the lives of Virginians. She's running to make healthcare, housing, and energy bills more affordable. And she's running to stand up to the far-right extremists determined to set our Commonwealth back.
[_**But we've set an ambitious fundraising goal to keep laying the groundwork to flip Virginia blue. # [Lights, Action: Cut!](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=169941550&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5OTQxNTUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQyNjIxNDEsImV4cCI6MTc1Njg1NDE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4PWKnrRUakCFCp759kAyi2ttnhB3sCO6r7fAg-IxCWM)
### Thoughts on how to navigate interest rate uncertainty
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Aug 3

| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/lights-action-cut?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e7f45adc-2313-4ede-abc7-536305f382fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Markets were shaken on Friday when the July jobs report [released](https://substack.com/redirect/2ae158ae-e492-4182-9ea4-d84136543780?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) announced that only 73,000 jobs were created in July. This is down from the 115,000 expected and is another indicator confirming the economy is weakening. If there is any doubt of the slowdown, revisions to jobs data for previous months dispelled that belief. The May and June payroll numbers were **[revised](https://substack.com/redirect/7b8bb440-4d9f-46c9-8c3e-67bc2afb86f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) down by 258,000** to 19,000 and 14,000 jobs, respectively. And while these revisions are much smaller than 800,000 job [revision](https://substack.com/redirect/1aae44f2-bae7-419e-b4cb-52dc44ad675b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that took place last year, they help explain the growing gap between economic perceptions and realities.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/76ff0ee2-0c3e-46d3-b8ec-9f79e65dd0d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [Blomberg](https://substack.com/redirect/8505a941-5c8f-4094-8456-ae59a3f032fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Shortly after the disappointing data was released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, [President Trump fired the woman who was responsible for compiling the data](https://substack.com/redirect/67218cb3-987d-483b-bde0-aafa45a9175a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), ironically growing the unemployed ranks (by at least one).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RPvuUaXEcoMW87g88sKj00Y6sa5phpoeFgVQTzDfpFI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169941550)
Another datapoint also reported on Friday suggested the labor market trend may be reflective of a broader weakening. The Institute for Supply Management (ISM) announced their [July manufacturing index reading came in at 48](https://substack.com/redirect/1c864a92-2b22-4f29-b862-77830121ce8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the lowest in 9 months. It's also the fifth straight month the index has been below 50, a concerning pattern because readings below 50 suggest a contraction in manufacturing. Further, 25% of manufacturing companies surveyed by the ISM indicated they are reducing headcount. Not exactly a sign of economic optimism or strength!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1623fec5-4bd2-40a3-8122-892fb1327b7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: Bloomberg
Both the payroll and manufacturing indicators shed light on a weakening US economy that seems more fragile than many believe. The odds of a recession are rising rapidly, and to diminish this risk, the Federal Reserve is being nudged by the Trump Administration to cut interest rates. Lower rates, it's believed, will spur a lethargic housing market, provide relief to over-indebted consumers, and may spur capital expenditures from both businesses and consumers. All of that should strengthen the labor market.
> _**Lower rates, it 's believed, will spur a lethargic housing market, provide relief to over-indebted consumers, and may spur capital expenditures from both businesses and consumers.**_
Given stable employment is one the Fed's two mandates, it would be very appropriate for the Fed to cut rates to support the labor market, right? Not so quick. The Fed has a second mandate - to ensure price stability. And the Trump Administration's stop-and-go trade war has injected a heavy dose of uncertainty into the equation, as tariffs produce inflation. Given recent inflation data suggested prices were starting to rise again, perhaps the Fed should wait? The conflicting pressures on the Fed have led to whipsawing expectations regarding the timing and magnitude of potential rate cuts.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17900d13-de9a-47ef-a889-88c50ff53677?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [Invesco](https://substack.com/redirect/48633814-a93c-4f54-ba90-d2f5862031a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
As I've often said, the best way to navigate uncertainty is to zoom out, extending both the timeline of analysis and the breadth of domains to consider. When I do this, I conclude the path of rates is lower, and if I were running the Fed (I was told in 2012 by senior Fed officials that having authored a book about financial bubbles disqualified me because markets are generally efficient...but that's a topic for another day), I'd lower rates.
Let's begin by looking at longer term pressures, and for brevity, **I 'll focus on the most important visible driver of economic activity over a decade-plus view: demographics**. The developed world is rapidly aging, and this means an increasing number of people are moving to fixed incomes...and those on fixed incomes tend to spend less, especially as longevity focused advancements in healthcare extend the duration over which they need to live on their retirement savings. All else equal (an admittedly unrealistic assumption), less spending due to an aging population implies lower prices.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RPvuUaXEcoMW87g88sKj00Y6sa5phpoeFgVQTzDfpFI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169941550)
What if we expand the domains of consideration from economic to include technological innovation, perhaps **the most disruptive force the world has ever seen**. Yes, I'm talking about artificial intelligence, but there's so much more. There's space. There's quantum computing. And biofabrication. And there's energy advancements such as next generation (modular) nuclear as well as deep sea mineral extraction. And financial innovations stemming from crypto. I could go on and on, but in short, we're able to do, get, and produce more with the same or fewer inputs. All of this points to more supply, and, assuming all else equal (same caveat), lower prices.
It's my belief these pressures will overcome the one-time impact of tariff-driven inflationary pressure. As we've already seen, many countries want to trade with the United States are willing to accept some tariff level. And because corporate profits of those operating in the United States have been strong, many companies will absorb some portion of the tariffs and report margin pressure. While this may impact financial markets, lower profits by themselves have a limited direct impact on employment. And for some industries, higher prices because of tariffs may self-correct as entrepreneurs pursue profit opportunities emerging from higher prices. The additional supply may ultimately lower prices, perhaps to levels below pre-tariff levels, albeit with more US employment and heightened domestic contribution.
### **Higher prices because of tariffs may self-correct as entrepreneurs pursue profit opportunities emerging from higher prices.**
Sure, tariffs on products that are never going to again be made in the United States may not generate this dynamic, but even then, the tariff will be incorporated by businesses into future planning, prices will adjust, and the disruption will be non-recurring. I think most businesses are doing what my business is [doing](https://substack.com/redirect/4afd5450-11f6-427a-a1fc-daca2b559f3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): assessing the risks, making adjustments, and preparing for multiple scenarios. (As a matter of fact, I was recently on a local TV news station [discussing](https://substack.com/redirect/0b80714e-47a2-4348-ac5a-d8e688855e0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) exactly that.)
So while it's unclear what the Fed will do, my analysis suggests they should cut rates sooner rather later. Inflation worries, to use their own language, are "transitory" and therefore shouldn't be used as an excuse to avoid cutting rates. I am not alone in this belief: the recent rates decision created the most [dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/6156fb4e-d89d-43d5-81cc-3296a512b1c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) among the governors of the Federal Reserve in over 30 years.
The **lights** have exposed a weakening economy; the Fed's September **action** seems obvious to me: **cut**.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RPvuUaXEcoMW87g88sKj00Y6sa5phpoeFgVQTzDfpFI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169941550)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ba88bf4f-4e35-46c0-b885-96ff0595c802?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/ef66e412-576e-4bf3-a532-64d0977fdab7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/52f63647-03d5-4547-be6a-6b2665b2e65f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/4885e358-61f7-4b26-9fcc-e41c91967607?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: This isn't just another email.
body:
A battle bigger than politics.

| Hi Friend —
---
This isn’t a typical email. I want to share something personal — something I don’t typically discuss. I hope you’ll read to the end, because I believe we’re at a defining moment here at True the Vote.
Since day one, our path has been uphill. We’ve faced resistance every step of the way. Some of it you’ve seen, but most of it we’ve kept quiet. Everyone has enough burdens of their own, and frankly, some of what we’ve endured is so outrageous it would sound unbelievable. So we’ve kept our heads down, shoulders to the wheel, and pressed forward. Quietly. Faithfully.
Now, the time for silence is over.
We are in a spiritual battle for survival. And I believe, with all my heart, that it is time to speak boldly. To stand up and declare, to every force working to silence us, they will not win.
Yes, our mission is to defend election integrity, but each day we pray that God will go before us — guiding our steps and upholding our cause.
I am far from perfect. But I am washed clean by the blood of our risen Savior and so is every member of the team at True the Vote.
I hope that does not offend you. Still, I say it in love. Even if you’re against us, even if you don’t believe — this truth must be spoken.
For months now, we’ve been fighting a quiet war on the tech front. Our email delivery has been throttled. Our platforms have continued to fail without explanation. Despite our best efforts — audits, protocol updates, expert consultations — the problems persist. In fact, they’ve grown worse.
We now know that some of our supporters haven’t received an email from us since 2024.
It makes no sense.
A few weeks ago, we sent an email titled _“15 Years in the Fire”,_ marking our anniversary with a look back on what our story has been thus far. We included a donation link — and for the first time in our history, not a single cent was received. Zero.
Not because people didn’t care. We heard from supporters who never got the email. Others said the donation link didn’t work. Many tried to give and couldn’t. We later learned that on that very day, our credit card processing settings were inexplicably changed.
But, this isn’t about one glitch or one email. This has been building for years. And today, I draw a line in the sand:
_To all the haters, all the minions, all the forces of darkness that continue to try to break us ... you lose._
_You may shut down our email; you may cut off our funds; you may threaten, sue, slander, poison, imprison, debunk, defame us. You’ve done it all. I bear the scars. And. Yet. You. Lose._
_Even if we are removed entirely from this battlefield, you will never stop the millions of people seeking truth. They are awake. They will not be silenced. And we will not stop. We are soldiers for the Kingdom, at whatever cost._
If Evil thinks it can make us cower, let this email be an indication of our resolve.
| | “What good is it for someone to gain the whole world, yet forfeit their soul?”
---

Mark 8:36
True the Vote will continue, undaunted, on this odyssey for election integrity — anchored to the Rock of Jesus Christ. We fight not just for voters, but for the soul of this nation.
We are called — to rise again, to stand firm, and to press on. And with grace and grit, in His strength, we shall overcome.
Keep the faith. Hold the line. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW!
Ever onward —
|
---
P.S. I just checked and the page is currently working.
Tomorrow, we’ll resend _“15 Years in the Fire”._ If you’ve been standing with us — thank you! If you’re just finding us — welcome! Either way, in the days ahead we’ll be coming to you in new venues, more channels, stronger than ever. Ever. Onward.

| **Are you still with me, Peter?** I’m checking in because I know that a _lot_ has happened this year... and it's only August. I know that people are seeing their healthcare, retirement security, and job protections get stripped away to make room for billionaire tax breaks. I know that this administration's mass deportation plan is disrupting communities and turning neighbors against each other. And I know that fascists in Tallahassee and D.C. are pushing the limits of their power, and will _keep_ pushing until people either accept their extremism or give up. **But Peter, I want YOU to know that I’m standing ten toes down against this cruelty. And I need you to stand with me.** **The beginning of a new month is our chance to show the world that one election didn’t defeat our movement, and _every_ donation powers our comeback.** [**_So Peter, if you’re still with me, will you please donate whatever you can by midnight to send a message that our movement is still strong? Peter,

They said the quiet part out loud.

In a recent speech, a Minnesota state legislator stood up and declared the “real threat” to America isn't criminals in the streets or radicals burning down businesses, it's _“white men sitting in the front.”_

No, seriously. On the record. On the floor.

**This is Omar’s Minnesota.**

Whereas if you are Christian, conservative, or just happen to be born white, you are the villain.

This is exactly why I am running for US Senate in 2026.

| [ **CHIP IN $10 TO STAND WITH ROYCE** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b75052bd3d614a8ba2f7135007f5e0de&_e=nWinaKpPcaJM4w12ecIUg2CiFGJwwJ_H584s1Faqc2LJ62wbeP5UIX2U5xHjDzAl--yywr3MfXqCn9T29EqeecqdPn7S7iCjGv6Z-UjCbOAMt3FwqvWKp_uEZqCxWVM533Wi0iajZYpP_iqk11zH5JTTFp0cDgcGDydo8UNwnWQeiXgpHtHBHuIk3svjvUiWA_E60tB6N40EknObm3YupeBord9JjToCyaoARUG9ih82KsDKhrpVTRs11Tg7yam9TGG-0ypVcbBzlU8EWmLbyktjHwA6oRtTH4wGf8KoKLRQ2Dlw4OY6jztJFL5paLGnKj-GaIx5APlkRU0Z1w0CFh8aFPMKE2bxEgiWq83ENYowACEhvNSgr1Kq9fzNBomJHCFKEG3xDnWybp6-LBMXkR5YgT3OJqt3JxbwpDx_UA_RH5I-RAFKi1yDKSPFEzSB6W7t0FwvwPk0MtMu8UqJ7HMnsFo9MzZKgH9Fb5a8YZ3_91vOGpPJHwjTyqdsD9RgrWrxH_IUabWB3BiXqTHQYUwpY2DdgNow_rajwm-qbtK0BM5BCpriBRucRQtNnLzF)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

clean_body: This is Ilhan Omar’s Minnesota | Peter, They said the quiet part out loud. In a recent speech, a Minnesota state legislator stood up and declared the “real threat” to America isn't criminals in the streets or radicals burning down businesses, it's “white men sitting in the front.” No, seriously. On the record. On the floor. This is Omar’s Minnesota. Whereas if you are Christian, conservative, or just happen to be born white, you are the villain. This is exactly why I am running for US Senate in 2026. | I won't bow to identity politics because I am not afraid to speak the truth. And because I believe all men are created equal, and that includes the white ones, I'm sick of watching this state, and this country, slide into division and hatred, marked as “progress.” They want to divide us. We can unite around faith and truth. For the people, Royce White Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Team DNC
subject: Your representative voted *against* Pennsylvania families
body:
---
Derek, If you’re reading this email, your representative voted for Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill.” That’s right. Rob Bresnahan voted for the _largest-ever_ cut to basic needs programs, like rural hospitals and affordable health care, to fund a tax break for billionaires. Here’s what that means for Pennsylvania families: ❌ Over 484,000 Pennsylvanians will lose health insurance,
❌ nearly 58,000 Pennsylvanians could lose their jobs,
❌ and the average Pennsylvanian’s electricity bill will increase by 8.1%. This law is a disgrace, and so is Rob Bresnahan for betraying working families by voting for it. **Democrats are organizing now to kick him out of office — and Republicans out of power in 2026 — but we need your help to win this fight.** [**If holding Republicans accountable and electing Democrats who’ll fight for working families matters to you, then we’re asking you to join our fight by making a donation today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250803_4162_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4162_22930333_EcXYzN&akid=4162%2E22930333%2EEcXYzN) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250803_4162_fr&refcode2=4162_22930333_EcXYzN&akid=4162%2E22930333%2EEcXYzN)**
